programme.desc: O campeonato alemão de rali é uma das séries mais populares do automobilismo, que vem correndo desde 1970. Em sua corrida de 1983, o modelo esportivo Opel foi excepcionalmente bem-sucedido.

programme.title: Classic Races - Quattro "A nova dimensao 1985"
programme.desc: Em 1985, a Audi precisou deixar sua marca no automobilismo e fez exatamente isso com o "Quattro". No cenário do rally, os caras de Ingolstadt (Alemanha) inventaram algo que é verdadeiramente de uma nova dimensão.

programme.title: Classic Races - Quattro "A nova dimensao 1985"
programme.desc: Em 1985, a Audi precisou deixar sua marca no automobilismo e fez exatamente isso com o "Quattro". No cenário do rally, os caras de Ingolstadt (Alemanha) inventaram algo que é verdadeiramente de uma nova dimensão.

programme.title: Classic Races - Mercedes Races novamente 1954/55
programme.desc: 1954. A Mercedes corre novamente. Depois de mais de 20 anos de abstinência, a Mercedes retorna no circuito Grand-Prix. Com muito empenho, engenharia avançada e com os melhores pilotos de Grand-Prix do mundo.

programme.title: Histórico 'Fórmula V
programme.desc: No final da década de 1950, apareceram na América carros de corrida de Fórmula Vee. No final dos anos 70, a série foi descontinuada. Mas hoje os pequenos runabouts estão novamente em corrida na "Fórmula Vau Europa Histórica".

programme.title: Ken Block no Monza Rallye Show
programme.desc: Em Monza, Ken Block está pronto para competir contra todas as estrelas do automobilismo no Monza Rally Show.

programme.title: Ken Block no Monza Rallye Show
programme.desc: Em Monza, Ken Block está pronto para competir contra todas as estrelas do automobilismo no Monza Rally Show.

programme.title: Motorstories - Porsche Dreams em Sao Francisco
programme.desc: O fã Porsche Marco Wendlandt realiza seu sonho: dirigir um coupé Porsche 911 de 1984. Com a ajuda do grande Mike, um vendedor de carros de Los Angeles, ele encontra seu carro dos sonhos em São Francisco. Depois de visitar DenBeste e a coleção Mustang, eles se dirigem à fábrica de carros da Carol Shelby para completar o sonho americano dos motores V8.

programme.title: Motorstories - Porsche Outlaw Magnus Walker, Los Angeles
programme.desc: Marco faz uma incrível viagem de carro pela Califórnia. Em seu recém-adquirido cupê Porsche 911 de 84, ele se dirige a Los Angeles para conhecer um dos mais conhecidos entusiastas da Porsche do mundo: Magnus Walker, o "fora-da-lei urbano". Depois de uma corrida improvisada pelas ruas da cidade, Magnus convida Marco a visitar sua oficina e sua impressionante coleção.

programme.title: Motorstories - Contos de carros do Alto Deserto na California
programme.desc: Em sua viagem a Las Vegas, Marco visita o grande Mike em Apple Valley, uma área remota no alto deserto da Califórnia, onde eles encontram alguns amigos curiosos que já foram criadores de tendências na personalização do carro californiano. Ele então se envolve com os temíveis amigos motoqueiros do Big Mike enquanto eles circulam pelo deserto espalhando medo e pânico.

programme.title: BMW 503 - A Convertible with a V8 Engine
programme.desc: O nobre 4-lugares 503 conversível era um dos modelos mais exclusivos da BMW nos anos 50. Muitas estrelas internacionais do esporte e do cinema e outros clientes ricos gostavam deste veículo esportivo de luxo.

programme.title: BMW M3 Test Drive - A BMW de maior sucesso de todos os tempos!
programme.desc: Nos anos 80, a BMW lançou um carro que tinha verdadeiros genes de corrida, o M3. Originalmente concebido como modelo de homologação para o Campeonato Alemão de Carros de Turismo, tornou-se num dos carros desportivos de estrada mais quentes do mundo.

programme.title: Ford GT40 - Project 'Victory in Le Mans'
programme.desc: Com seus carros V8, a Ford mostrou que eles foram capazes de construir vencedores de corrida. O Ford GT40 foi um excelente exemplo para isso, especialmente em Le Mans.

programme.title: 4x4 - Traccao as quatro rodas em vagoes de estacao
programme.desc: Os vagões de estação são geralmente considerados como carros familiares ou apenas veículos com muitos porões de carga. Mas o Skoda Octavia, o Opel Insignia Country Tourer, o Subaru Outback, o Audi S4 allroad quattro e o Seat Leon x-perience querem ser mais do que isso. Seu visual offroad atrai o aventureiro interno e sua tração 4x4 proporciona a tração certa em terreno acidentado. Nem sempre tem que ser um SUV.

programme.title: 4x4 - Veiculos todo-o-terreno extremos
programme.desc: Neste episódio, damos uma olhada em alguns dos exemplares mais extremos do mundo offroad: um monster truck Fiat Panda cujos pneus têm um diâmetro de 1,5 metros, um Ford Raptor com 600 hp, uma conversão de um Mercedes G-class Edition da ORC, um Volkswagen Touareg R-Line modificado da JE Design, um Jeep Grand Cherokee SRT8, o carro-chefe da marca, e o Fiat Panda Cross.

programme.title: 4x4 - SUV compactos do Extremo Oriente
programme.desc: Na Lexus, a divisão de veículos de luxo da Toyota, a última tendência foi para formas angulares e uma aparência mais agressiva. Com seu design extravagante, o NX200t definitivamente se destaca. A Infiniti, divisão de luxo da Nissan, é mais conservadora a esse respeito. O QX30 apresenta um design clássico do Infiniti com um capô curvo e uma aparência energética. Além disso: o SUV Mazda CX-3 da cidade.

programme.title: 4x4 - Irmaos SUV
programme.desc: Três irmãos da mesma plataforma de produção Volkswagen: o Skoda Kodiaq oferece espaço para sete pessoas e pontua com um preço inicial favorável, o Volkswagen Tiguan é um pouco mais caro, mas oferece uma gama mais ampla de motores e gadgets mais técnicos, e o Seat infunde o segmento SUV com a paixão espanhola.

programme.title: 4x4 - Classe empresarial com tracao nas quatro rodas
programme.desc: O Jaguar XF-S deve pressionar a BMW, a Audi e os outros concorrentes no segmento de classe executiva. Os britânicos querem ensinar aos melhores cães alemães o verdadeiro significado da palavra medo. A Volvo tem uma abordagem diferente. Seu S90 é cativante devido a seu design escandinavo e motores econômicos de quatro cilindros.

programme.title: 4x4 - ORZ
programme.desc: ORZ Veículos, uma empresa alemã especializada na produção, venda e instalação de peças e acessórios para jipes, faz com que o sonho americano fora da estrada se torne realidade para os europeus. Um bom exemplo desta abordagem é o Brute, uma versão pickup do Wrangler que tem muito pouco em comum com o modelo de produção.

programme.title: 4x4 - SUV compactos e mini SUV
programme.desc: Compactos e mini SUVs são perfeitos para a cidade enquanto suas capacidades off-road são menos importantes. O Seat Arona é um típico representante desta gama de modelos específicos. Outro pseudo off-roader é o Volkswagen T-Roc. O menor SUV Volkswagen pode repetir o sucesso do Volkswagen Tiguan mais vendido? Também: os concorrentes asiáticos Hyundai Kona, KIA Stonic e Toyota C-HR.

programme.title: Chris Pfeiffer analisa a BMW F 800 R
programme.desc: A BMW F 800 R é robusta e tem muito temperamento. O campeão mundial Chris Pfeiffer mostra o quanto se pode divertir com um BMW F 800 R. A sua bicicleta de trabalho é baseada na versão que pode comprar.

programme.title: Audi MTM S8 Talladega R
programme.desc: O Audi S8 Plus não é de forma alguma subestimado, mas é e permanece fiel à subestimação desta série de modelos. Aqueles que querem mais poder podem obter um impulso da MTM.

programme.title: Classic Races - Indy 500
programme.desc: Um dos carros de corrida mais espetaculares do mundo: o Indy 500. Visto por um grande número de pessoas, ele nunca deixa de impressionar no circuito de corrida de Indianápolis.

programme.title: História do carro - Historia do carro - AMG
programme.desc: AMG sempre foi sinônimo de excelência automotiva, exclusividade e prazer de dirigir dinâmico.

programme.title: História do carro - Historia do carro - Lancia
programme.desc: Veículos notáveis e sucessos lendários no mundo do automobilismo, por um lado, golpes do destino e erros econômicos, por outro. Mas o mito de Lancia continua vivo.

programme.title: História do carro - Historia do carro - BMW M
programme.desc: A divisão automobilística da BMW tem sido uma história de sucesso desde sua criação. E não apenas nos trilhos. Os carros de estrada com a letra M na traseira fascinam a todos e rapidamente ganharam um grande número de seguidores.

programme.title: História do carro - Historia do carro - Ford
programme.desc: Bom e confiável, americano e de vanguarda - nos anos 60 e 70 a Ford construiu um clássico após o outro, e sempre com a Fórmula Ford: tecnologia simples, preço acessível. Taunus, Bath, Escort e Capri são hoje carros de culto. A história automotiva mostra os clássicos da Ford.

programme.title: História do carro - Historia do carro - Historia do carro - Volvo
programme.desc: Eles são inclinados e com arestas, redondos e bonitos. Sólido e seguro, robusto e confortável: os antigos suecos da Volvo. Cada modelo é um clássico, cada modelo é um carro com o qual sonhar.

programme.title: Audi TT RS Roadster
programme.desc: Um roadster com um motor de corrida ruidoso: o Audi TT RS tem o lendário motor esportivo de 5 cilindros da empresa sob o capô. Este motor icônico combina com a embalagem da moda?

programme.title: Bentley Mulsanne EWB
programme.desc: A versão longa da Bentley Mulsanne é um excelente exemplo de uma limusine com chope. Com ela, a marca britânica de carros de luxo colocou a fasquia extremamente alta quando se trata de conforto automotivo.

programme.title: BMW Active Hybrid 7
programme.desc: Com a Active Hybrid 7, ao contrário de sua antecessora com o mesmo nome de modelo, BMW agora conta com um híbrido completo, que também pode ser acionado exclusivamente com energia elétrica.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle - Atraves de Utah em uma Harley, Parte 1
programme.desc: Utah, terra de rochas vermelhas, como era chamada pelos nativos americanos. Estamos em um passeio de moto por 1.500 milhas percorrendo algumas das mais belas e dramáticas paisagens dos Estados Unidos. Parte 1

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle - Atraves de Utah em uma Harley, Parte 2
programme.desc: Utah, terra de rochas vermelhas, como era chamada pelos nativos americanos. Estamos em um passeio de moto por 1.500 milhas percorrendo algumas das mais belas e dramáticas paisagens dos Estados Unidos. Parte 2

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle - Atraves de Utah em uma Harley, Parte 3
programme.desc: Utah, terra de rochas vermelhas, como era chamada pelos nativos americanos. Estamos em um passeio de moto por 1.500 milhas percorrendo algumas das mais belas e dramáticas paisagens dos Estados Unidos. Parte 3

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle - Atraves de Utah em uma Harley, Parte 4
programme.desc: Utah, terra de rochas vermelhas, como era chamada pelos nativos americanos. Estamos em um passeio de moto por 1.500 milhas percorrendo algumas das mais belas e dramáticas paisagens dos Estados Unidos. Parte 4

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle - Rally Europeu Boss Hoss 2011, Parte 1
programme.desc: Em 2011, o Rally Europeu Boss Hoss foi realizado na cidade de Pullman City, no oeste da Alemanha. Mostramos os destaques deste evento onde cerca de 160 bicicletas monstruosas V8 foram reunidas. (Parte 1 de 2)

programme.title: KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: É muito grande e a maior parte vem em laranja: a KTM 990 Adventure. Sobre terreno acidentado é muitas vezes conduzido de pé. Hoje, o 990 é considerado o especialista off-road entre os Enduros de viagem.

programme.title: Kymco People GT 300i - Revisão & Test Drive
programme.desc: Rodas de 10 ou 16 polegadas - isto é realmente apenas uma questão de gosto? A MOTORVISION TV revela as vantagens e desvantagens da motocicleta de roda grande People GT 300i, fabricada pela Kymco.

programme.title: Saab 93 e Saab 99 Turbo
programme.desc: Em 1937, foi fundada na Suécia uma empresa fabricante de aviões que mais tarde se tornou a famosa fabricante de automóveis Saab. Apresentamos dois de seus modelos icônicos de carros, o Saab 93 e o 99 Turbo.

programme.title: Motorstories - Mercedes 280 SE encontra a America - Long Island
programme.desc: Não é coincidência que os carros esportivos italianos sejam considerados as jóias da coroa em sua categoria. Todos conhecem Ferrari, Maserati, Lamborghini e Alfa Romeo, mas e a Iso Rivolta? A marca desapareceu, mas a lenda continua viva entre os entusiastas. Há vários carros daquela lenda quase esquecida em um museu de carros particulares na Flórida.

programme.title: Motorstories - Mercedes 280 SE encontra a America - Florida
programme.desc: O que é o carro americano dos anos 60? Qual é o símbolo da fabricação de carros americanos? Para muitos é o Corvette ou o Ford Mustang. Na busca por esses carros de sonho americanos dos anos 60, Tillmann Miritz faz uma descoberta surpreendente na Flórida: o Ford Mustang de 1964.

programme.title: Uia-pédia - A História do Chocolate, Sorvete e Vinho
programme.desc: O chocolate que comemos hoje nem sempre foi assim. Nem o sorvete. O vinho foi descoberto por acaso. Sabe como? Surpreenda-se com essas e muitas outras curiosidades sobre essas três delícias com a Uia!

programme.title: Uia-pédia - A História do Pão, Pizza e Café
programme.desc: Você realmente sabe a origem do pão? E da pizza? Sabe como o café se tornou tão presente nas nossas vidas? Essas e muitas outras curiosidades são respondidas pela fonte inesgotável de conhecimento sobre comida da Uia.

programme.desc: Batanes, conhecida por seu litoral de tirar o fôlego nas Filipinas, é o lar do clã de pescadores Mataw.

programme.title: Make This Tonight - Desejando Comida Chinesa
programme.desc: O chef Daniel está desejando comida chinesa esta noite. Por isso, ele cozinha lagosta com macarrão de alho e um molho "alcoólico" e dá um toque refrescante em uma salada de estilo chinês.

programme.title: Make This Tonight - Amor Vegetariano
programme.desc: O chef André faz uma versão vegetariana do famoso bife com fritas. No lugar das batatas, ele usa cogumelos portobello; para o bife, ele prepara uma couve-flor com mix de curry e uma gremolata fresca de salsa, hortelã, cranberries e amêndoas para colocar por cima; por fim, ele ensina um delicioso purê de ervilhas.

programme.title: Make This Tonight - Noite de Sushi
programme.desc: O chef Alex prepara sushi em casa! Ele começa com um tutorial sobre como fazer o arroz de sushi perfeito e, em seguida, prepara um tempurá de camarão e vegetais e termina com rolinhos Califórnia e seu favorito: niguiri.

programme.title: Tod@s Tentam - Como Se Pronuncia Beurre Noisette?
programme.desc: Você sabe falar francês? Se não souber, não tem problema, porque você vai se divertir juntos com os participantes nesses novos desafios. Nesse episódio de Tod@s Tentam, eles vão ter que aprender a pronúncia correta de pratos franceses, acertar o país de origem dos vídeos, entre outros desafios.

programme.title: Tod@s Tentam - Sushi de 10 Minutos e Sorvete com Gosto de Branco
programme.desc: Nesse episódio de Tod@s Tentam, os participantes terão que adivinhar se o alimento é orgânico ou não, fazer sushi em 10 minutos e ainda passar por um teste para adivinhar o sabor do sorvete. Não deixe de assistir esses novos desafios!

programme.title: Comida de Série - Hora da Aventura Encontra Eu, a Patroa e as Crianças
programme.desc: As receitas mais diversas estão nesse episódio de Comida de Série. Umas com muito bacon, outras com muitos pêssegos, mas todas muito deliciosas. Assista para descobrir os segredos gastronômicos das suas séries prediletas.

programme.title: Biblioteca na Cozinha - Livros Nos Fazem Viajar
programme.desc: Em Biblioteca na Cozinha, Isadora Becker veste personagens da literatura, enquanto prepara pratos que aparecem nas histórias. Nesse episódio: Pé na Estrada, Gula, Tenda Dos Milagres e Como Água Para Chocolate.

programme.title: Biblioteca na Cozinha - Torta de Cereja, Arancini, Beef Wellington e Chili com Carne
programme.desc: Isadora inspira-se em livros incríveis para reproduzir receitas que são de dar água na boca. Mary Poppins, Jogo Dos Espelhos, 50 Tons de Cinza e Deuses Americanos são os livros desse episódio.

programme.title: Menu Kids - Café Da Manhã dos Campeões com Caetano e Valentim

programme.title: Jail - Charging Forward
programme.desc: A trustee finds himself in hot water after officers discover his contraband stash. A disgruntled oil worker doesn’t think the charge fits the crime after stealing two hedge trimmers. Conflicting accounts arise when an officer and a stylish inmate butt heads in booking. A woman learns to put herself first after failed attempts to help her boyfriend’s addiction land her in prison.

programme.title: Jail - Sleep Walker
programme.desc: A homeless man punches a singing transient over a racist comment. An assailant hits a sleeping man with a brick over a money dispute. A sobbing young man insists he was falsely arrested. A bar fight sends a UFC fighter to the hospital and the bartender who slugged him to jail.

programme.title: Jail - Over Cooked
programme.desc: A man arrested on drug warrants is upset about the BBQ brisket he left on the grill. An intoxicated ladies' man flirts with the jail staff and an inmate finds it funny that he sold tree leaves as pot to an undercover officer. Brother turns on brother when a good deed gets mixed with alcohol. A man caught panhandling believes officers should arrest hardened criminals instead of him.

programme.title: Jail - Fearless
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.title: Jail - Pizza Problems
programme.desc: A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody. A dad gets busted for DUI while on his way to pick up a pizza for his kids. Officers recover drugs from a suspect’s pocket who is puzzled as to how they got there. A woman learns the hard way “what happens in Vegas stays in Vegas”.

programme.title: Jail - High Wire Act
programme.desc: An inmate goes on a rampage when he suspects police of losing his money. Officers have a tough time with a drunk man. An alleged prostitute is stabbed. A drunk trapeze artist takes a drive on his moped.

programme.title: Jail - Humility & Tranquility
programme.desc: Cousins come to jail together but only one leaves. Officers contend the best they can with an unruly inmate. Naked meditation in a parking lot lands a street artist in jail.

programme.title: Jail - Good Citizen
programme.desc: A woman refuses to wear jail-issued clothing. A man tells his tearful tale to officers, and a chatty inebriated woman is placed in isolation.

programme.title: Jail - Stripper Hygienist
programme.desc: A combative man is placed in a side cell. A transgender woman shares her story. A wild driver is placed in custody, and an intoxicated man is arrested for assault.

programme.title: Jail - That Bites
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL an unruly detainee is sent to isolation, twice. In Multnomah county a young man feverishly waits for his release. In Portland, OR a man is jailed for bitting his girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail - Overflowed
programme.desc: An inmate claims to be the victim of an internet scam which led to his arrest. Officers take it easy on a rowdy inmate struggling through a spiritual crisis. Years of prison time can’t sway a young gang affiliate from changing his ways. Prisoners cause plumbing problems to send a message. A mother and daughter bond over being locked up together.

programme.title: Jail - Crack Pipe on Phone Wall
programme.desc: Chaos surrounds a routine medical screening of an inmate. In the prison phone center, a smoking pipe is discovered and a mystery ensues. A pregnant woman is investigated over potential sex crimes.

programme.title: Jail - Toothless Tears
programme.desc: A transient man tries to resist the officers in booking then serenades them with a song. A difficult inmate blames his behavior on various medical conditions, and a woman claims to be Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Jail - Meth Rage
programme.desc: Officers conduct a strip search after an inmate is accused of carrying contraband. A repeat offender dances for deputies and fellow inmates. High on meth, a man acts erratically during booking.

programme.title: Jail - Mr. Crisp
programme.desc: A woman is brought into the detention center hogtied. A disruptive teen is sent to a holding cell. Casino valets tip the authorities about an intoxicated woman leaving behind the wheel.

programme.title: Jail - Attention Junkie
programme.desc: A woman is placed in isolation after disparaging other inmates. Alarms blare while a fight erupts in the shower room among inmates. A man booked into jail is revealed to have a 20-year arrest record.

programme.title: Jail - Wigging Out
programme.desc: A couple is taken into custody for lewd and indecent exposure. An intoxicated woman believes that she is being treated unfairly, and a man with an existing wrap sheet is busted.

programme.title: Jail - No Good Deed
programme.desc: A woman comes clean to having drugs hidden where they can’t be seen. An inmate’s exotic makeup is cleverly created with candy and toothpaste. A couple is surprised to find that holding someone against their will is a felony. Doing the right thing turns into an extended stay for a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Jail - Cupcake
programme.desc: A high-priced escort is accused of skipping out on her limo tab. A ladies' man directs foul language at the jail nurse, and a seasoned prostitute considers getting into the sex-toy business.

programme.title: Jail - Git 'er Done
programme.desc: In Reno, NV a woman becomes violent with officers after having over indulged in boxed wine. In Salt Lake City, UT a drunk man is brought in for urinating in front of a family restaurant and in attempt to expedite his release he requests that the officers "git 'er done". In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Jail - Bad Boys
programme.desc: Deputies assist arresting officers by removing an angry man from their patrol car. Violent outbursts plague an arrest. One woman struggles with bail. Three drunk men become wildly emotional.

programme.title: Jail - Cell Fight Suicide
programme.desc: A cell brawl escalates quickly. After being arrested on her wedding night, a woman has deep regrets and serious reflection. Officers free a man from his own noose and place him on a vigilant watch.

programme.title: Jail - Stairway to Jail
programme.desc: After falling down a flight of stairs while drunk, a young man is amazed he is in jail for refusing to go to the hospital. A correction officer tries to explain to a young man why carrying a gun-shaped knife is not a good idea. An expectant father is arrested after a gin-fueled rampage at his parent's house and misses the birth of his first child. A woman arrested for selling fake designer purses as real ones says she didn’t know it was a crime.

programme.title: Jail - Little Big Man
programme.desc: A dominatrix is arrested for playing rough. A father is accused of assaulting his daughter's boyfriend, and an inmate's negative attitude leads to trouble.

programme.title: Jail - Fight For Your Right
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail - Family Man
programme.desc: In his holding cell, a man fights officers after taking Xanax. An officer discovers a suspect may be facing criminal charges for his son. K-9 units are needed during a search for improvised weapons.

programme.title: Jail - Locked Out
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a disorderly man in the detention center is sent to the padded room. A Sarasota, FL man hurls insults at officers while in custody. In Portland, OR a drunk and destructive young man is placed in the drunk-tank. In Las Vegas, NV a woman tries to lie about the reasons behind her detention.

programme.title: Jail - Baby Mama Drama
programme.desc: To avoid self-harm, an intoxicated man is handcuffed to a booking bench. After fighting at a bar, a combative prisoner is arrested. Also, an unmarried couple squabbles during the booking process.

programme.title: Jail - Fainting Man
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman fights arrest resulting in a trip to the isolation chamber. One inmate calls 911 within jail walls causing confusion. Later, officers run to the rescue when a man passes out.

programme.title: Jail - Moneybags
programme.desc: Three inmates start brawling inside the drunk tank. One man must wear a mask so that officers can avoid his rain of spit. A young woman fails to take jail seriously and behaves provocatively.

programme.title: Jail - Homeless Hospitality
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. In Spokane, WA a homeless man is brought in for assault. In Salt Lake City, UT a frequent visitor is brought in for threating the security staff at a local bar with a firearm.

programme.title: Jail - Jail Songbird
programme.desc: In Portland, OR a man in custody accuses officers of being involved in the 1992 event at Ruby Ridge. In Sarasota, FL a drunk man falls off his bike and purports to have been hit by a car. In Las Vegas, LV a daring inmate attempts to make a break for it while the supervising officers attend to a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail - Joyriders
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for an open container of beer. In Salt Lake City, UT a woman is stunned as to how drug paraphernalia wound up on her person. In Las Vegas, NV a former bus driver relays sad details about his past. In Portland, OR a shoplifter receives some sage of wisdom from one of the officers.

programme.title: Jail - A Night of Fights
programme.desc: A man tries to swallow his ring. A heroin addict wants help when he realizes his habit has cost him everything he loves. One man fights with his girlfriend in a bathroom, another fights with his girlfriend at home, both are surprised they are arrested for domestic violence. A habitual criminal is worried that other inmates will fight over him.

programme.title: Jail - Fake Seizure
programme.desc: A man in detention is paranoid about officers handling him inappropriately. A man in custody claims to have a seizure. A man is taken in to custody for stealing videogaming equipment.

programme.title: Jail - Kick Door Dad
programme.desc: A young father pulls a desperate double robbery to make ends meet. A routine shakedown gets deadly when officers uncover alarming contraband. An inmate plays innocent about her criminal past until confronted by officers. An antsy woman’s brazen behavior tests the patience of officers.

programme.title: Jail - Rave & Rage
programme.desc: A party of three girls are brought in after having been arrested for possession at a nearby music festival. Drugs are found on the person of a music festival attendee during intake. A slightly older party goer is taken into custody for possession.

programme.title: Jail - Bad Luck Hooker
programme.desc: A man brought in for trespassing becomes violent. A sex worker admits she۪s witholding her pediculosis condition from clients. A woman explains her tattoos are a reminder of the women she loved.

programme.title: Jail - Mad-Icidal
programme.desc: Deputies corral a suspect into a cell after serious turmoil. A man becomes suicidal after being brought in on burglary charges. Facing the gavel, a prisoner berates a Judge during court proceedings.

programme.title: Jail - Two Drunk Guys
programme.desc: A night of karaoke results in a domestic-violence charge, and a drunk inmate starts a fight with his cellmate.

programme.title: Jail - Coopertive Cons
programme.desc: An intoxicated woman clashes with officers but later shows that good behavior pays off. An experienced prostitute gives solid advice to a younger woman and begs her to get out of the “game.” An angry woman smashes her cheating boyfriend’s windshield.

programme.title: Jail - O Canada
programme.desc: A jail chaplain counsels a sad inmate. An intoxicated woman demands to talk to the Canadian Embassy.

programme.title: Jail - Prince of Monaco
programme.desc: In Reno, NV an intoxicated man is placed in isolation after exhibiting combative behavior. In Portland, OR a man wearing a red dress is brought in for trespassing and tells officers that he is in the FBI. In Reno, NV two young men are set straight after stealing a car.

programme.title: Jail - Handle with Care
programme.desc: Officers try to deal with a sloppy and combative drunk. A man gets locked up after he blows all his casino winnings, and a woman gets tricked by her bail bondsman.

programme.title: Jail - Scrapping By
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV a man who insists he paid for a speeding ticket becomes so incensed that he is placed in a restraining chair. In Sarasota, FL a belligerent man accuses officers of touching him inappropriately. In Portland, OR officers help a young mother and her kids.

programme.title: Jail - Family First
programme.desc: Texting, drinking and driving are not a good mix for a mother with her baby in the backseat of her car. After his arrest for shoplifting, a young man begins to realize the consequences of his lifestyle choices. A woman arrested on a warrant finds herself in solitary confinement after showing off her assets to another inmate. Officers try to convince a homeless young man that patching up his relationship with his family is better than being drunk on the streets.

programme.title: Jail - Chair Houdini
programme.desc: An intoxicated inmate escapes his restraints. A young woman denies she abused her mother, and a guard removes an inmate who is causing a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail - Pedaling Backwards
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail - Housing Fight
programme.desc: Needles are found on one woman while a stun gun is discovered on another. A DUI test stirs up bad memories for a man driving while intoxicated, and a convicted murderer becomes violent.

programme.title: Jail - Two Fisted Fights
programme.desc: A violent ruckus ensues after a man is placed in jail. Secret prison communication methods are explored and examined. Later, deputies cautiously extract a disruptive man while his wife is held nearby.

programme.title: Jail - Sunshine on a Cloudy Day
programme.desc: A woman who says she’s called “Sunshine” has less than a sunny disposition. A man ditches a halfway house for jail to get his life in order. A career criminal shows no regret for his “thug life.” Tense moments in Booking as officers and medical staff try to save a young man from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Jail - Cell Block Scuffle
programme.desc: Over the course of a single shift, officers are forced to go toe to toe with a hotheaded inmate refusing to change cells without a fight and then must deal with the whims of a homeless man who demands room service and an upgraded jail cell.

programme.title: Jail - Landlord Attack
programme.desc: An inmate swallows a stash of drugs and then comes down with a case of the munchies. A 72-year-old offers an unusual excuse for dealing drugs to teens at a mall, and a woman charged with assaulting a landlord fakes being sick to get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail - My Watch
programme.desc: An agitated man is overly concerned about his 30K watch. cries when he has blood drawn. An inebriated woman threatens her arresting officers with bodily harm, and a woman has no recollection of her arrest.

programme.title: Jail - Gulf War Soldier
programme.desc: By proclaiming that he is a Gulf War Veteran, a man states he should be imprisoned. A corporal investigates a “prisoner on prisoner assault.” An Officer’s last shift is filled with fireworks.

programme.title: Jail - Phone Fight
programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail - Hopeless Hooker
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman is placed in a restraint chair. A troubled woman with a drug addiction is brought in on prostitution charges. One man is taken to a sobering cell to sleep off his intoxication.

programme.title: Jail - Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Two men are found fighting on security cameras. Meanwhile, an impromptu tattoo jail parlor is discovered and shut down. Later, a Russian man and his mysterious friend are excited to be in a U.S. jail.

programme.title: Jail - Spit Mask Drunk
programme.desc: Deputies deal with chaos after volatile inmates begin fighting. Accusations of deceit plague a booking as a woman is arrested for drunk driving. Prisoners are restrained after causing a commotion.

programme.title: Jail - Fragrant & Flagrant
programme.desc: A cologne salesman boasts and promotes his "magic potion". A man bloodies his neighbor in a one-sided feud. Taking an illegal drug has an unexpected consequence to one man’s face. Open Booking becomes a stage as one woman launches her singing career.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje - Episode 63

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Son of a mobster, Detective Sergeant Rick Hunter and Sergeant Dee Dee McCall team up to catch a serial killer.

programme.title: Hunter - Hard Contract
programme.desc: McCall's ex-partner has gone bad. In an attempt to save him from prison, McCall and Hunter try to stop him.

programme.title: Hunter - The Hot Grounder
programme.desc: After the Commissioner's wife is murdered, Hunter and McCall piece together the clues to find the true killer.

programme.title: Hunter - A Long Way From L.A.
programme.desc: A meek pick-pocket is accused of beating a woman. Hunter and McCall, unconvinced, must find the true culprit.

programme.title: Hunter - Legacy
programme.desc: Hunter uses a mobster's girlfriend as bait after she overhears an argument between him and his father.

programme.title: Hunter - Flight On A Dead Pigeon
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall help a girl who claims her uncle has died and all of his pigeons have been stolen.

programme.title: Hunter - Pen Pals
programme.desc: A drug dealer is killed by a thief who stole Hunter's "backup" gun. McCall must clear Hunter's name.

programme.title: Hunter - Dead Or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter tracking two bank robbers crosses paths with Hunter and McCall.

programme.title: Hunter - High Bleacher Man
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall must protect a sleazy criminal who has been given immunity for fingering a top criminal.

programme.title: Hunter - The Shooter
programme.desc: A motorcycle cop is killed by a man on a "nighthawk." The killer motivated by a dispute over a game at a bar.

programme.title: Hunter - The Garbage Man
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall must track down a killer who has been shooting parolees.

programme.title: Hunter - The Avenging Angel
programme.desc: A mentally disturbed surveillance expert attempts to "help" Hunter by killing a suspect and a witness.

programme.title: Hunter - The Snow Queen, Part 1
programme.desc: A cocaine dealer being escorted by an obnoxious detective escapes. Hunter and the detective pursue her.

programme.title: Hunter - The Snow Queen, Part 2
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cocaine dealer continues and the plot thickens as Hunter and McCall's cases collide.

programme.title: Hunter - The Beach Boy
programme.desc: The Beach Boy arrives in LA and begins to kill drug dealers. Hunter and McCall must figure out his next move.

programme.title: Hunter - Guilty
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall pursue a convicted murderer who is free and has vowed to kill the jurors who convicted him.

programme.title: Hunter - The Last Kill
programme.desc: A contract killer makes hits throughout the city in order to ingratiate himself with a criminal kingpin.

programme.title: Hunter - Fire Man
programme.desc: Someone has been setting fires all over the city to empty warehouse, and Hunter and McCall are on the case.

programme.title: Hunter - Sniper
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go after a sniper who is killing blondes that remind him of his wife who jilted him.

programme.title: Hunter - Case X
programme.desc: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.

programme.title: Hunter - Night Of The Dragons
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest

programme.title: Hunter - The Biggest Man In Town
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.

programme.title: Hunter - Rich Girl
programme.desc: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.

programme.title: Hunter - Killer In The Halloween Mask
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.

programme.title: Hunter - Rape And Revenge, Part 1
programme.desc: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.

programme.title: Hunter - Rape And Revenge, Part 2
programme.desc: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.

programme.title: Farscape - Picture if You Will
programme.desc: A fortunetelling portrait acquired from a passing trader turns out to be the tool of an old enemy. With Ben Browder.

programme.title: Farscape - Home on the Remains
programme.desc: Crichton and the crew desperately search for food to nurse an ailing friend back to health, but they may have to sacrifice a friend to save one.

programme.title: Farscape - Dream a Little Dream
programme.desc: Zhaan, Chiana and Rygel come to grips with the apparent deaths of Crichton, Aeryn and D'Argo.

programme.title: Farscape - Out of Their Minds
programme.desc: After an enemy ship fires on Moya, crew members find that their personalities have been switched. With Ben Browder.

programme.title: Farscape - My Three Crichtons
programme.desc: Contact with a mysterious light source creates three separate Crichtons from different rungs of the evolutionary ladder.

programme.title: Farscape - Look at the Princess: A Kiss Is but a Kiss
programme.desc: Moya and her crew land on a planet just in time to celebrate the coronation of a new royal couple, but there is a catch -- the princess has not found her prince.

programme.title: Farscape - Look at the Princess: I Do, I Think
programme.desc: A quick turn of events sees Crichton chosen as the unwilling groom-to-be in the upcoming royal wedding.

programme.title: Farscape - Look at the Princess: The Maltese Crichton
programme.desc: Someone removes Crichton's head from a statue; Aeryn examines her choices; Zhaan faces a Moya builder.

programme.title: Farscape - Beware of Dog
programme.desc: A crew member falls prey to a shape-shifting parasite and the rest of the crew must locate it before it is too late.

programme.title: Farscape - Won't Get Fooled Again
programme.desc: Crichton becomes a mental slave on a commerce planet and must trust his greatest enemy, Scorpius, to help him see the truth through the illusions.

programme.title: Farscape - The Locket
programme.desc: The crew races to save Crichton after contact with a hyper stream of time speeds up his aging process.

programme.title: Farscape - The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Talyn destroys a Plokavian ship, leading to the capture of the crew.

programme.title: Farscape - A Clockwork Nebari
programme.desc: Chiana's unknowing part in the Nebari scheme to control a portion of the galaxy is revealed after they take over the Moya.

programme.title: Farscape - Liars, Guns and Money: A Not So Simple Plan
programme.desc: Stark plans to rob a less-than-reputable bank to get them money for a sizable purchase of slaves, but things don't quite go the way he thinks they will.

programme.title: Farscape - Liars, Guns and Money: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: Infected currency from the Shadow Depository threatens the crew of the Moya as they decide how best to rescue D'Argo's son.

programme.title: Farscape - Liars, Guns and Money: Plan B
programme.desc: The crew of the injured Moya must rely on the help of disorganized mercenaries to save Crichton from Scorpius.

programme.title: Farscape - Die Me, Dichotomy
programme.desc: An alien surgeon comes to the aid of Crichton, removing the control chip from his head and healing the Moya.

programme.title: Farscape - Season of Death
programme.desc: The Moya's crew must quickly recover from their last adventure because Scorpius is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Farscape - Suns and Lovers
programme.desc: An outrageous love triangle ignites dangerous sparks aboard a space station, where the crew find themselves trapped during a powerful interstellar storm.

programme.title: Farscape - Self-Inflicted Wounds: Could'a, Would'a, Should'a
programme.desc: Crichton learns the elusive technology that could allow him to return home to Earth, but while he is preoccupied with the consequences a crew member unsuspectingly nears death.

programme.title: Farscape - Self-Inflicted Wounds: Wait for the Wheel
programme.desc: A crew member must volunteer to stay behind to guide the sabotaged ship, knowing that it will soon be atomized.

programme.title: Farscape - Different Destinations
programme.desc: Indulging in some high-tech sightseeing at the site of a major historical event, Crichton and his friends are sucked through a time rift and find themselves in the middle of a key battle.

programme.title: Farscape - Eat Me
programme.desc: A brain-sucking alien and a pack of crazed Xarai threaten D'Argo, Chiana and Jool.

programme.title: Farscape - Thanks for Sharing
programme.desc: Traveling to a warring planet to obtain medicine for Talyn, who was injured in a skirmish with a Peacekeeper Retrieval Squad.

programme.title: Farscape - Green-Eyed Monster
programme.desc: Talyn gets swallowed by a Budong, and it is up to Stark to save them; Crichton, already distrustful of Crais, believes he and Aeryn are having an affair while Talyn himself soon shows his hatred of the human.

programme.title: Farscape - Losing Time
programme.desc: Parasitic Energy Riders hitch a ride on Moya, planning to plant themselves inside the bodies of the crew.

programme.title: Farscape - Relativity
programme.desc: The Peacekeeper Retrieval Squad finally reveals its true mission when it confronts Crichton and his crew.

programme.title: Farscape - Incubator
programme.desc: Scorpius (Wayne Pygram) risks it all when appealing to Crichton (Ben Browder) for an alliance by revealing his shrouded past.

programme.title: La Trepadora - S01:E082
programme.desc: Clementina sorprende a Felipe besando a Antonieta. Florencia revela a Victoria que ella es la nueva dueña de las tierras desde su casa hasta Los Samanes. Adelaida y Hansen se besan.

programme.title: La Trepadora - S01:E083
programme.desc: Hilario advierte a Moncho que, para volver a ganarse su confianza, deberá hacer todo lo que él le pida sin importar de qué se trate. Florencia le pide a Nicolás que se queden trabajando sus tierras para demostrarle a los Guanipa que no les temen y que, cuando él sienta que la ama, se casen por la iglesia. Ya en su casa, Hilario trata de explicarle a Victoria que se equivoca al pensar que Florencia es más importante que ella para él, le ruega a Victoria que lo perdone; pero la muchacha, que está demasiado herida, se marcha de Cantarrana asegurando que ya no lo puede ver como su padre.Adelaida se complace al ver lo que se ha esmerado Hansen por preparar la velada para compartir con ella. Victoria le confiesa a Clementina lo mucho que le duele sentir que ya no puede estar orgullosa de ser la hija de Hilario Guanipa como siempre lo hizo.

programme.title: La Trepadora - S01:E083

programme.desc: Malena quiere asegurarse si fue Isabel quien la delató con la policía, la busca para preguntárselo - María Balbina le insiste a Ricardo con lo de la boda; y éste, sorprendido, casi se delata pues le da a entender que ella no es la única que se quiere casar con él - María Lourdes llama como testigo en la Corte a Gertrudis; y aunque Patricia se opone, el Juez Echeverri acepta que ella sea la primera en testificar contra Lorena.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje - S01:E83

programme.desc: El equipo intenta evitar que Eckhart adquiera un elemento raro, pero un ladrón lo consigue. La mujer que tiene la capacidad de hacer que los hombres se enamoren de ella pone su mirada en Brennan.

programme.title: Mutant X - Pasado como prólogo
programme.desc: En un intento desesperado por salvar su propia vida, Ashlocke revive a un antiguo alquimista egipcio que representa una amenaza letal para el equipo Mutante X.

programme.title: Mutant X - Jugada de poder
programme.desc: El equipo lucha por quitarle poder a un coronel militar que ha amenazado con desatar un holocausto nuclear.

programme.title: Mutant X - Tiempo al cuadrado
programme.desc: Ashlocke retrocede en el tiempo para intentar hacerse invencible dándole algo a su yo más joven, lo que llevó a Brennan y Shalimar a seguirlo.

programme.title: Mutant X - De quién son estos bosques
programme.desc: El equipo se adentra en el desierto para localizar a una bestia asesina que tiene como objetivo a los excursionistas.

programme.title: Mutant X - Ningún hombre se queda atrás
programme.desc: Un avión militar es derribado detrás de las líneas enemigas, lo que lleva al equipo a hacer un intento desesperado por recuperar el arma secreta del gobierno escondida a bordo.

programme.title: Mutant X - Encrucijada del alma
programme.desc: El equipo se propone salvar a Brennan, que ha quedado atrapada dentro de una ciudad invisible y se enfrenta a la ejecución por un crimen que no cometió.

programme.title: Mutant X - Señal desde arriba
programme.desc: Tres extraterrestres que representan una seria amenaza para la humanidad apuntan a Shalimar, por lo que el equipo se propone salvarla de sus malvadas garras.

programme.title: Mutant X - Cuerpo y alma
programme.desc: Un mutante incorpóreo se apodera de los cuerpos de varias personas y se dispone a perseguir a los que le hicieron esto. Uno de ellos es un médico que le gusta a Shalimar.

programme.title: Mutant X - El grift
programme.desc: La sombría ex novia de Brennan se dirige a él en busca de ayuda cuando su última estafa da un giro mortal.

programme.title: Mutant X - Al final del destino
programme.desc: El equipo se enfrenta a su misión más peligrosa hasta el momento: detener a un grupo de ecoterroristas.

programme.title: Mutant X - Dentro de estos muros
programme.desc: Brennan está molesta con Adam, quien le dice que se le encomendó mantener un secreto y se va después de hablar con esa persona. El hombre está buscando a alguien y está dispuesto a matar a cualquiera para llegar a esa persona.

programme.title: Mutant X - Dificultades
programme.desc: El equipo se infiltra para investigar muertes inexplicables en una prisión.

programme.title: Mutant X - Una vez alrededor
programme.desc: El equipo interviene para proteger a un testigo de cargo principal cuya vida ha sido amenazada antes del juicio.

programme.title: Mutant X - Juicio final
programme.desc: Un tribunal misterioso encuentra a Adam culpable de intentar dominar el mundo con sus supermutantes y lo condena a muerte, enviando al resto del equipo a una misión para salvarlo.

programme.title: Mutant X - Infierno
programme.desc: El equipo está tras la pista de un mutante pirómano que está causando el caos, mientras que Shalimar se ve obligada a dejar de lado su miedo al fuego para salvar a Emma.

programme.title: Mutant X - Un paso mas cerca
programme.desc: El equipo lucha por contener los poderes mutantes fuera de control de Brennan cuando pone en peligro la misión de proteger a la hija de un senador.

programme.title: Mutant X - Despertar
programme.desc: El equipo ayuda a la tripulación de una estación de investigación oceánica amenazada por una criatura prehistórica que antes se creía extinta.

programme.title: Mutant X - Para que no se convierta
programme.desc: Shalimar accede a regañadientes a ponerse en contacto con su padre cuando el equipo se entera de que su empresa está involucrada en pruebas y manipulación genética.

programme.title: Mutant X - En la noche sin luna
programme.desc: En la emocionante apertura de la temporada, los miembros supervivientes de Mutante X emergen de una explosión mortal para encontrarse con Lexa, quien les hace comenzar a cuestionar las suposiciones fundamentales sobre su mundo.

programme.title: Mutant X - Salarios de pecado
programme.desc: El equipo de Mutante X debe detener la subasta de una sustancia altamente letal que una serie de notorios terroristas internacionales están compitiendo por adquirir.

programme.title: Mutant X - La raza
programme.desc: El equipo de Mutante X llega para ayudar a una base militar que se ha infectado con una enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Mutant X - La toma de cuervos
programme.desc: Cuando Lexa es drogada sin saberlo con una sustancia letal, el equipo debe correr para encontrar el antídoto antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Wineman - Los vinos únicos de Tea de La Palma
programme.desc: Descubramos por qué son únicos los vinos de Tea de La Palma

programme.title: Wineman - Utiel-Requena En búsqueda del origen del vino español
programme.desc: Vamos a adentrarnos en la riquísima historia de una comarca que según se han sucedido los años ha pertenecido a diferentes reinos, que han marcado su economía y forma de vida.

programme.title: Wineman - Málaga, desde el monte hasta la playa
programme.desc: Axarquía, Ronda, Manilva, Sierras de Málaga, posiblemente tienen un solo elemento en común, el cultivo de la uva, pero no se parecen en nada sus paisajes, ni formas de cultivo.

programme.title: Wineman - Vinho verde
programme.desc: El nombre de esta Denominación de Origen de Portugal quiere decir literalmente Vino Verde, por que sus uvas eran tradicionalmente vendimiadas verdes, para evitar los riesgos de la podredumbre.

programme.title: Wineman - Oporto
programme.desc: Si duda alguna el vino más prestigioso de Portugal es el Oporto, su nombre deriva de Porto, que en portugués quiere decir Puerto, o mejor dicho El Puerto en donde los vinos son envejecidos y desde donde eran desde antiguo embarcados a todos los rincones del Mundo.

programme.title: Wineman - Burdeos margen izquierda
programme.desc: La Margen Izquierda de Burdeos es la región más influyente del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman - Lanzarote, los vinos del volcán
programme.desc: Es difícil recorrer una isla de tantas formas como lo hemos hecho: en todo terreno, a pie, en camello, en drones y hasta debajo del agua.

programme.title: Wineman - Vinos del Altiplano: Jumilla y Valencia
programme.desc: En este episodio os quiero enseñar el lugar donde trabajo, Jumilla.

programme.title: Wineman - Vinos del Altiplano: Alicante y Valencia
programme.desc: En este episodio vamos a conocer regiones fronterizas cargadas de historia.

programme.title: Wineman - California 1: tenemos una Misión
programme.desc: Descubriremos la ruta por la que llegó la vid a California de la mano de misioneros españoles.

programme.title: Wineman - California 2: de la costa sur al interior
programme.desc: Recorreremos el Valle Central de California, desde las zonas frescas de la costa, hasta las más calurosas del interior.

programme.title: Wineman - Chile 2 y Argentina: vinos a ambos lados de los Andes
programme.desc: Wineman saldrá desde Santiago rumbo a las zonas clásicas del vino chileno.

programme.title: Wineman - California 3: Napa, Sonoma y Zinfandel
programme.desc: Desde San Francisco viajaremos a los valles de Napa y Sonoma, los grandes nombres de referencia del vino californiano.

programme.title: Wineman - California 4: Paul Draper, el hombre que venció a Burdeos
programme.desc: Descubriremos cómo, tras la célebre "cata de París", en la que compitieron los mejores vinos de Francia contra los mejores de california, se produjo la gran eclosión de sus vinos.

programme.title: Wineman - Ribera del Duero
programme.desc: Ribera de Duero, el vino de las fronteras Cultivados a partir de 600 metros de altura, sus viñedos tienen la brotación más tardía de Europa.

programme.title: Wineman - Rioja 2, El Barrio de la Estación
programme.desc: Hay un claro motivo de por qué La Rioja ha ido siempre varios pasos por delante del resto.

programme.title: Wineman - Rioja 3, Presente, remirez, futuro
programme.desc: El gusto del vino no puede, o mejor dicho, no debe de estar reñido con el gusto del consumidor.

programme.title: Wineman - Ancha es Castilla
programme.desc: ¿Dónde empieza y donde acaba una denominación de origen?

programme.title: Wineman - Rhiengau vs Sauternes
programme.desc: Determinados estilos de vinos sólo se puedan elaborar en contados años, en los que se producen aparentes adversidades.

programme.title: Wineman - Portugal: del mar a la montaña
programme.desc: Desde los alcornocales, en el suroeste de Portugal, viajaremos hasta el norte, para descubrir cómo se convierten las cortezas de estos árboles en tapones.

programme.title: Wineman - Vinos Canarios
programme.desc: Marmajuelo, Gual, Vijariego, Baboso Negro, Verdello, Listán negro, Negramoll, son algunos nombres de variedades autóctonas que fueron responsables de algunos de los vinos más preciados del mundo.

programme.title: Wineman - Jumilla, Monastrell, la superviviente
programme.desc: Hay testimonios de la presencia de la uva en Jumilla de hace 5.000 años.

programme.title: Wineman - Jumilla, el ciclo del tiempo
programme.desc: Durante un año completo seremos testigos del ciclo de una vieja viña de Monastrell, sobre un suelo pobre y bajo un sol de justicia.

programme.title: Wineman - Cariñena, Cariñena y Cariñena
programme.desc: En este episodio vamos a visitar la mayor cooperativa de Cariñena, que es además el resultado de la unión de un grupo de cooperativas.

programme.title: Wineman - Yecla, un municipio, una denominación
programme.desc: No sabemos qué beberían los pobladores del Monte Arabí, pero si los Romanos, que aquí dejaron profunda huella.

programme.title: Wineman - Uruguay - Madirán
programme.desc: Tanto Tannat por domesticar Visitaremos Uruguay y recorreremos algunos de sus mejores viñedos y nos quedaremos impresionados de ver su evolución en el transcurso de tan pocos años.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - Stage 3 - HUNGARY - 2024
programme.desc: The SCL Hungary this year is in the AQUAPARK in Budapest, Stage 3 from the spectacular MLO Strongman Champions League, World is Biggest Pro League. With five great events, such as: Viking Press, Farmer's Walk, Deadlift, Conan's Wheel, and A loading race with Beer barrels of 200 Kg. It is a must see!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League - Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days - FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit
programme.desc: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.

programme.title: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures - Episode 1
programme.desc: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.

programme.title: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures - Episode 1
programme.desc: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran Jeff Francis and Fox - Episode 1
programme.desc: Before the age of 23, U.S. Marine Jeff Francis filled out a total of three wills. His tours of duty not only protected our freedom but also created positive change for a country in need. When he came home, the transition back into civilian life proved to be difficult. For Jeff, his service dog Fox has become much more than just man's best friend.

programme.desc: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
