programme.title: Baitfuel Fishing Tournament - BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 1 - Quinte West, Ontario"
programme.desc: The BaitFuel Fishing Tour kicks off it’s season in Quinte West, Ontario where the teams will fish this Largemouth Bass Only event on the water of the Bay of Quinte.

programme.title: Captain's Log - "Operation Apalach"
programme.desc: Rooted in history, Apalachicola, Florida, is where Capt. Jonathan Moss finds himself today, scouting the marsh for hungry backcountry dwellers.

programme.title: Captain's Log - "Tarpon Time"
programme.desc: With only a limited amount of time, Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Pine Island Sound, on the hunt for monster migratory Tarpon.

programme.title: Captain's Log - "First Coast Fishing"
programme.desc: The tide is right for Capt. Jonathan Moss to chase that Northeast Florida slam.

programme.title: Captain's Log - "Space Coast Slam"
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss is fishing in the Northern Indian River Lagoon with DOA Lures Founder, Capt. Mark Nichols.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Grouper and Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take Sergeant Major (r) Jamey Caldwell fishing out of Hawks Cay for some grouper and tarpon action in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Night Vision Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell"
programme.desc: Sergeant Major (r) Jamey Caldwell brings some game changing technology along as he joins Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor for some nighttime tarpon fishing at the Long Key Bridge.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Dolphin and Swordfish with Sam Milazzo"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Sam Milazzo to find the elusive daytime Swordfish but run into some great Dolphin fishing on the way.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Fly Fishing Tour of the Keys"
programme.desc: "Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor patiently pursue big tarpon from the Everglades to the Middle Keys with fly rod in hand."

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Key Largo with Richard Black"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Richard Black for an exciting adventure in Key Largo, catching a wide variety of fish species on the shallow reef.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Bluefish with Jeff Malone"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Jeff Malone to find a frenzy of exciting Bluefish near Marathon, FL.

programme.title: The Cast - “Meat Run”
programme.desc: With a free day before Icast. Trenton and Ryan go offshore to try and fill the cooler. Catching a variety of species and hoping to get their hands on a hogfish.

programme.title: Local Knowledge - "SeaSafe Snook Part 1"
programme.desc: Water quality is everything—and the Star brite - SeaSafe team is back at it for the second year in a row! Led by Cory Redwine, Conservation Director of Project SeaSafe, this is the 4th Annual Clean Water Collective and it’s bigger than ever. This time, we’re in Grant, Florida, where 4 million clams are being released into the Indian River Lagoon, paired with the planting of thousands of mangroves, oyster work by CCA and trash clean ups to help restore one of Florida’s most critical ecosystems. But it’s not just about hard work—it’s about connection. With local captains, fishing legends, and the Local Knowledge crew on hand, we hit the water to show why this place is worth fighting for. From clam drops by drone, to in-water mangrove planting, to monster snook catches, this is hands-on conservation at its best. This two-part series kicks off with action, heart, and the kind of hope only a healthy waterway can bring. Don’t miss Part 1—where conservation meets community and everyone gets their hands wet.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour - "The END of our 2500 Mile Road Trip"
programme.desc: It’s the final leg of the Fly Shop Tour and what better way to end it than with a trip down to see the crew at Fly Fish Food. We learn the unique story of how owners Clark “Cheech” Pierce & Curtis Fry started their shop and spend some time chasing hungry Cutthroat. Wrapping it all up the team puts on the final conservation event of the season with Fly Fish Food and Fish For Garbage, as well as spending some time behind the oars on the Green River with crew at Western Rivers Fly Shop.

programme.title: Destination Dive - "Islamorada"
programme.desc: On this show we will explore the crystal-clear waters of Islamorada to experience all this area has to offer. We will highlight the critical roll sharks play in our eco system and what is being done to protect them.

programme.title: Dirt - DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
programme.desc: New. York. City. That’s where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan’s kitchen.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "Into the Yucatán"
programme.desc: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatan in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem. Dan Cabela travels to the region to find out more.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors - "The Maine Ghost Trains"
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff venture deep into Maine’s backcountry with their buddy Chuck, ice fishing remote lakes only reachable by snowmobile. Their journey ends at the legendary “ghost trains,” a pair of abandoned locomotives that now rest as silent monuments to a forgotten logging era.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors - "Gary Schroeder Memorial Turkey Hunt"
programme.desc: On this episode, we honor the life and legacy of Zumbrota Police officer Gary Schroeder while enjoying one of his favorite pastimes..Turkey Hunting! Gary's wife Kim, their three boys and nephew embark on a Turkey hunt in Central Minnesota to chase after some gobblers. In addition to honoring Gary and chasing Turkeys, we discuss the Invisible wounds that our servicemen and women face daily while protecting their communities and our freedoms. We also celebrate Johnstown Colorado Scheels Hometown Hero, Matt Hill.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors - "Healthcare Heroes"
programme.desc: On this episode of American Heroes Outdoors, We shift our focus to our Healthcare Heroes. Over the past 2+ years of the Covid 19 pandemic, Healthcare workers have gone above and beyond the call of duty to ensure they provide the best care to their communities even in the toughest of situations. Join us as we spend a day of Ice Fishing with Lock Jaw Guide service in Panfish paradise with our Healthcare Heroes and hear their stories of service and sacrifice

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes - "George Hamilton"
programme.desc: 101 year old WWII U.S. Navy veteran George Hamilton recounts his amazing life in the service and as a post war semi-pro baseball player.

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes - "Todd Berge"
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Lieutenant Colonel Todd Berge recounts his life as a fighter pilot and B2 Stealth Bomber pilot/instructor.

programme.title: Reel Animals - "Flood Tide"
programme.desc: Capt. Mike navigates South Carolina’s breathtaking marsh, seizing a brief window when the seasonal high tide floods the grass, bringing incredible fishing.

programme.title: Reel Animals - "Amelia Angler"
programme.desc: Capt. Mike joins a local legend in the waters of Amelia Island, exploring its rich fishery and targeting redfish, trout, and more in this coastal gem.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal - "Neap tide Hustle"
programme.desc: The bite’s dead during a neap tide, but Josh and Isaiah don’t back down. Watch them adapt, pivot, and turn a tough day into a hard-earned win. It’s not luck—it’s hustle.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal - "Wrecked Em'"
programme.desc: Josh and Alex explore the SS United States; the world‘s largest artificial reef.

programme.title: Dirt - DIRT - "Harvesting Tequila, Surfing Secret Coves & Tasting Legendary Mexican Flavors"
programme.desc: Guadalajara’s heritage runs deep. On the DIRT crew’s latest adventure, they explored the region’s rich history from volcanic highlands to secret surf coves. Chefs Xrysw Ruelas and Óscar Segundo sent Josh and co. to load up on locally grown coffee, spearfish between catching waves, and follow freshly harvested agave on its journey to becoming tequila. After learning the ropes of Mexico’s national sport, Charreria, and hitting up a Lucha Libre match, all the local flavors came together in a feast backed by thousands of years of tradition. There really is something special in the soil here.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes - "How This Photographer Crafted His Vintage Adventure Van | Ep. 8 James Barkman"
programme.desc: "On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we caught our good friend and photographer James Barkman out in the wild. He gave us a tour of his vintage ""Yellow Submarine"" inspired VW Van and broke down some of the modifications he has made to make this adventure bus feel more like home.

programme.title: TRP - "The Non-Slip Mono Loop Vs. The Double Figure 8⎟ H2T Episode #900"
programme.desc: Last week, we tested the Double Figure 8 against the Homer Rhode and it came out on top. This week, we are taking it even further and comparing it to one of the strongest knots I know, the Non-Slip Mono Loop. Which do you think is going to be victorious? - Watch now to enhance your skills and improve your fishing game! Don't forget to subscribe for more practical fishing tips and tutorials. - Check out how this test compares to all the others I have done; get your FREE Knot Guide here! — - https://bit.ly/3UnAeIP - All Socials ⎯ - https://linktr.ee/TomRowlandPodcast - How2Tuesday is presented by Danco Pliers! - Danco Sports is an industry-leading manufacturer of pliers, knives, and accessories for anglers worldwide. Since our start in 2006, we have been committed to providing affordable, high-quality products and outstanding customer service to anglers and fishing leaders alike. Danco Pliers is located in Stuart, Florida, where we wear flip-flops to work year-round. - Check out Danco here — - https://bit.ly/tomrowlandpodcast2

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors - "Family Recipe"
programme.desc: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds - "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"
programme.desc: From battling towering 12-foot waves in the Gulf of Alaska, to reeling in colossal 200 lb. halibut, they discover firsthand the rugged beauty of America's 49th state. This episode highlights Lindell Yachts as a top builder of rugged offshore sportfishing yachts, as well as Radon Boats as great pilothouse fishing and guide boats.

programme.title: The Cast - "Crappie Kingdom"
programme.desc: Trenton and Rex link up with Gehrig Dieter and Anthony Sherman from the Kansas City Chiefs. While filling the boat with crappie they got to learn about the guys and their careers in the NFL.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience - "Tarpon in the Key West Channels"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors - "Holy Smokes"
programme.desc: Michael and Larken travel to South Carolina's Lowcountry for a massive barbecue charity event supporting children battling serious illness. After serving up smoke for a great cause, they spend an extra day in the marsh chasing redfish and speckled trout.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal - "Family Day"
programme.desc: Josh and his wife Anna celebrate the first day of summer by taking their daughters out for a fun-filled day on the water.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal - "Opening Day"
programme.desc: Josh heads offshore for the first day of red snapper season with his friend Joe Koenraad.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal - "Beach Bros"
programme.desc: When Plan A and Plan B don't go as planned, Destin always has a way of bailing you out.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal - "Tarponist"
programme.desc: In this episode of going coastal, Capt. Joshua Calhoon & Marcus Castro set out for epic Tarpon fishing. They got one boat side and then decided to go after giant mangrove snapper for hook & cook at Pepper’s!

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors - "Great Lakes Extreme Fishing"
programme.desc: Kyle explores the Great Lakes on his Sea-Doo in search of walleye and lake trout.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors - "Bison Bison Bison"
programme.desc: Kyle Green and his buddy Jeremy set out on a buffalo hunt in the great state of Oklahoma. Along the way they learn about the true past and potential future of the American Buffalo from several interesting people with different perspectives.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors - "Invasive Carp Disaster"
programme.desc: Kyle Green heads to Yankton, South Dakota to learn about the history of the Missouri river and the people who count on the river for sustenance. The invasive carp are set to destroy this rich ecosystem and Kyle aims to stop this fish with his best weapon, a great recipe.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors - "The Great Eastern Turkey"
programme.desc: Kyle Green meets up with his friends at the National Wild Turkey Federation to dive into turkey conservation, and hunt the largest subspecies of wild turkey. Kyle finishes off this episode with his most favorite wild game recipe, boneless wild turkey wings.

programme.title: The Journey Within - "The Stag"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson sets his sights on a Free-Range New Zealand Red Stag, but it doesn't come easy. Dense fog, steep terrain, and thick vegetation make finding a mature stag no easy task. Watch as Mark Peterson and his guide cover the gorgeous New Zealand landscape in search of one of the most sought-after big game animals on the South Island of New - Zealand. On this hunt, Mark was unable to get his firearms import permit in time to take his Gunwerks rifle, so he'd again have to borrow from his guide.

programme.title: The Journey Within - "Chasing Giant Aoudad In California"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California. Next up on the list, California Aoudad. These Aoudad were introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s and have thrived ever since.

programme.title: The Journey Within - "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is in Ethiopia hunting Mountain Nyala. After the first two days, Mark has taken a Menelik’s Bushbuck and a Colobus Monkey but no Mountain Nyala. Finally, on Day 3 the hunting party receives the green light from the military to hunt in the area they wanted. It's time to put the Gunwerks rifle to the test.

programme.title: The Journey Within - "Eastern Colorado Muleys"
programme.desc: On this trip, Mark finds himself in Eastern Colorado looking for a big mature Mule Deer. Eastern Colorado is known for some of the best spot and stalk Mule Deer hunting in the US. With the rut in full swing, seeing bucks isn't usually a problem. But getting in range of a big mature buck can be a challenge. Mark spots the mature deer he wants to pursue and spends all of his time trying to get.

programme.title: The Journey Within - "Hunting Giant Eurasian Brown Bear in Croatia"
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he embarks on a thrilling hunt in Croatia for the Eurasian Brown Bear. Experience the beauty of the Croatian wilderness and witness the skill and precision required for a successful hunt. Follow along as Mark faces all the challenges dealing with wind and a big bear that is extremely smart, making it very difficult to harvest this amazing animal. Don’t miss this exciting hunting adventure with Mark Peterson in Croatia!

programme.title: The Journey Within - "Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | , South American Waterfowl Slam"
programme.desc: Mark's quest for the South America Waterfowl Slam has now taken him to Peru where he finds a surprising density of Cinnamon Teal. Although he already checked this species off the list in Argentina, his first hunt in Peru proves to be one of the best Cinnamon Teal shoots of his life. This is only the first afternoon and there are 5 days left to hunt the remaining 7 species.

programme.title: Bearded Buck - The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"
programme.desc: Join Gavin as he heads afield in Pennsylvania to chase gobblers. He finds himself in the middle of a perfect off the roost hunt that was captured beautifully.

programme.title: Turkey Posse - "Chaos Gobbler"
programme.desc: Josh Dahlke scouts a block of mature hardwoods to get the bead on a resident flock of turkeys. Fresh off an out-of-state turkey hunt, his brother, Jake, hops in the saddle for a memorable (and chaotic) morning in the spring turkey woods.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "KILLIN TREE"
programme.desc: Join WoodHaven's Mike Pentecost as he kicks off his Alabama turkey season - these mountain birds are tough to hunt!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "Kansas Buck Appears Out of Nowhere"
programme.desc: WoodHaven’s Josh Anderson heads to the Western Plains of Kansas in pursuit of a mature whitetail buck. Because of the wide open terrain, a decoy and blind calling can be very affective because of the visibility. After a few well-timed grunts on the Intimidator grunt call, a shooter buck shows up right at the base of the tree!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "HELP FROM ABOVE"
programme.desc: A heaven sent early morning turkey hunt with Colten and Mark Scroggins. The Apex Turkey Ninja TSS will make you a believer in killing turkeys with a .410!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "Old Monroe"
programme.desc: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "GIGGLES & GOBBLES"
programme.desc: Colten Scroggins and the whole family return to the blind to see if they can call one of the other gobblers back in to their setup. A family that hunts together stays together!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "Hunting a 10 1/2 YEAR OLD BUCK"
programme.desc: After years of chasing one of the oldest and most elusive bucks he's ever encountered, Phillip Vanderpool uses the WoodHaven Initmidator grunt call to finally gets his shot at Tinman, a legendary 10.5-year-old buck in Kansas.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "CALLING A HUNG UP TOM!"
programme.desc: Mike and Jacob are hunting an old turkey "Meanie" they have some history with on public land. Mike demos the WoodHaven box call clip.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way - "IF OLD CALLS COULD TALK"
programme.desc: This 10 gauge doesn't mess around! Greg Keeton was a well deserved Prostaffer of the Year for WoodHaven. He joins Mark Scroggins and Tony Doty in Nebraska to hunt Merriam's and Rios. Greg has one of the very first Real Hen box calls and guess what, she still sings a pretty turkey tune!

programme.title: Angler's Channel Bass Wrap Up - ACBWU-25-07
programme.desc: 2026 Minn Kota - Hummingbird Owners Tournament.

programme.desc: We Deliver The Outdoors.

programme.desc: James wraps up his Argentine adventure, but not before one final surprise.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
programme.desc: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 4
programme.desc: Kyle Yates & Picklebowl host Danny Wuerffel team up against pro-pickleball star Megan Fudge & former tennis player Amer Delic.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
programme.desc: November 28, 2023 - Welcome to week 10 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Surprise Stingers.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
programme.desc: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
programme.desc: Watch the opening tie of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) from the CCI Brabourne Stadium! The action features Men's Singles between American Champion Brandon Lane (Mumbai) and Polish #1 Mathias Matysik (Pune), followed by Women's Doubles (Katie Morris & Glauca Lane) and Men's Doubles where Vansh Kapadia and his partner secure Pune's first match win. Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
programme.desc: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
programme.desc: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Backdraw Semifinal
programme.desc: Stefan Andren and Alix Truong take on Christine Karges and Eric Oncins in this Mixed Pro Split Age Backdraw Semifinal match.

programme.desc: On January 31, 2023 - the Scottsdale Scorchers face off against the Tempe Tornadoes - live at The Orchard!

programme.title: The PressBox Party - The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
programme.desc: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 2

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech
programme.desc: The grand finale of the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional Championship, the second of six regionals for the season. The rivalry matchup features the top teams from Utah Valley University and Utah Tech.This broadcast highlights the intense Men's Doubles game, where Utah Tech's star player Liam Duffin—hailed as one of the top collegiate players nationwide—teams up with Clayton Boydston to face Utah Valley's duo of Bryce Larson and Charles Case.The stakes are high: teams are competing for $5,000 in scholarship money and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri, where $30,000 is on the line. Ultimately, Utah Tech's first team prevails, taking home the national bid and the Utah Regional title.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Women's Pro Singles - Jardim vs. Kop
programme.desc: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.

With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
programme.desc: Experience the electrifying atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the Mumbai Pickle Power hunt for their first tie victory of the season against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The tension reaches a fever pitch with Hyderabad’s "fireball" Shawn Mendes dominating the singles court, while Mumbai’s Brandon Lane and Santhosh Narayanan aim to turn the tide in the critical doubles matchups. Witness high-risk "Pickle Plays" and strategic substitutions as these athletes battle for precious points on the road to the semi-finals. With both teams fighting for survival on the league leaderboard, every rally is a masterclass in professional grit and tactical brilliance.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Trapped By My Controlling Husband
programme.desc: Shara claims that her newlywed husband, Luke, is a “mean, insecure know-it-all” who won’t let her own a cell phone, hold a job or leave the house alone -- and also dictates how she should dress and wear her makeup. Luke denies all of Shara’s allegations and claims that she is “no angel” and has a vicious temper. Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Dad Accused of Faking His Own Death
programme.desc: A man's claim of his father's disappearance leads to a shoking decption.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - DP Mystery: Morgan’s Murder
programme.desc: Parents suspect foul play in their daughter's alleged death by suicide.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Munchausen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible. Note: Viewer discretion is advised.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Racism Follow Up
programme.desc: A racist man tries to change his ways. A man finds out he is biracial.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - My Annoying Family
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shares advice for dealing with rude, crude and obnoxious behavior from your family members.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - 49-Year-Old Dad Dating Friend
programme.desc: Joni claims that Gina used to be one of her besties and that they were inseparable, from spending birthday trips out of town to girls’ nights out, often ending in Gina crashing at Joni’s house. Joni says all that changed when 23- year-old Gina began dating Joni’s 49-year-old father, David, behind her back and giving birth to David’s child. Joni says she feels betrayed by Gina and her father, even going as far as sharing her dislike for her former friend and father’s newfound romance on TikTok. Gina says the picture Joni paints of them being best friends is all a lie, but in any event, Joni needs to accept her relationship with Joni’s father. David says despite his daughter’s disapproval, he is going to continue being in a committed relationship with Gina, but that doesn’t mean he can’t also have a relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - You Can’t Say That! Pt 1
programme.desc: Some believe self-censorship is a big problem today, particularly in light of the idea that someone can be "canceled" for their words -- blocked from having a prominent public platform or career for sharing their opinion. Dr. Phil interviews Nate, a former Idaho police officer, who claims he was fired after making a TikTok video about NBA superstar LeBron James that went viral and has been viewed over 4 million times. Nate explains how the fall-out from the video affected him and his family, too. Dr. Phil also speaks with conservative political commentator Tomi Lahren, who says she recently had to be protected by state police from student protestors at the University of New Mexico. Greg Lukianoff, president of the Foundation for Individual Rights and Expression, says he believes Americans have lost the ability to discuss their differences rationally. And, Dr. Shaun Harper, founder and Executive Director of the USC Race and Equity Center, says he is firmly against hate speech and feels people need to be more mindful about the effects of their words.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - “My Daughter is Lying about Cancer”
programme.desc: Mary’s 30-year-old daughter, Lynn, claims to be suffering from numerous medical conditions, including stomach cancer, heart disease, uterine cancer, rheumatoid arthritis and other ailments -- but Mary believes it’s all lies, concocted to gain money and attention. Mary says she has found no evidence of her daughter’s health conditions and was horrified to learn that Lynn had created a crowdfunding website, asking for donations for medical expenses. Lynn insists she’s gravely ill and says it sickens her even more that her mother doesn’t believe her. The mother and daughter face each other for the first time in a year on Dr. Phil’s stage. Dr. Phil reviews Lynn’s medical records -- how does she explain the inconsistencies? And, how can Lynn find a return to health and start living again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - "My Daughter Is Spoiled & Entitled”
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Cherylyn says she loves living the high life and admits she is a spoiled and entitled“princess”who has spent tens of thousands of other people’s money on her lavish lifestyle. Cherylyn says she maxed out her 19 credit cards on designer shoes, handbags, purses, clothes, makeup and pampering! And, Cherylyn says she insists on fine dining, fast cars and her boyfriend, Tyler, footing the bill. However, Tyler says he has nothing more to give Cherylyn except an ultimatum, which he delivers when he comes face-to-face with her onstage. Cherylyn's mom, Joey, says that her selfish and manipulative daughter has blown over $130,000 in less than a year and her spending has left a trail of devastation which includes pawning over $7,000 worth of family heirlooms and stealing her identity. Sparks fly when Cherylyn defends her entitled behavior during the taping. What jaw-dropping statement does an unrepentant Cherylyn make to Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Cindy and George Anthony:The Interview
programme.desc: George and Cindy Anthony speak out for the first time about their daughter, Casey's trial.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - How To Spot A Scammer
programme.desc: With the economy in trouble, a lot of people are under pressure and getting desperate. Learn the tools to protect yourself from liars, cheats and scammers who are trying to take advantage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Family Triangle Drama (Part 2)
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Christina, who emailed him desperate for help for her daughter, Tara, who she says can be an angry monster. Christina left the home when Tara was 13 years old, but now, she says she's worried that her daughter is in a toxic situation with the ex-husband she calls narcissistic and his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Today, meet the new wife and find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Will Fights
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Are My Children in a Cult?
programme.desc: A father is fighting for custody of his 4 children because his ex-wife is allegedly in a cult.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Our Lying Ex-Boyfriend
programme.desc: Tiffany says her relationship with her son’s father, Erik, was destroyed by his constant lying and empty promises, to the point where she completely cut him off and has not seen him in over three years. Erik admits he has lied to his ex-girlfriends. Then, just this past year, Erik dated Sheka who says after doing research midway through their relationship, she uncovered his lies and put a stop to their wedding plans. So, when did Erik begin to con and deceive people? As Erik is accused of one lie more shocking than the next, his mom, Jody, says her son has been lying since he was a child. And, don't miss part 2, when more women come forward from Erik’s past.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
programme.desc: The family of a 16-year-old self-professed gang member comes together to urge the teen to turn his life around. And, two former gang members have an important message for the teen -- Is he ready to walk away from the gang life for good?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - My Husband’s Secret Life
programme.desc: Danielle says that her husband of nearly 10 years, John, has been living a secret life -- reaching out to men on Craigslist for sex and looking at child pornography. John insists that the child porn was accidentally downloaded, and while he admits to exchanging emails with men online, he maintains that he never met up with anyone in person. How does he explain his actions? And, what will the results of a polygraph test reveal?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Hell Weddings
programme.desc: Every bride wants to shine on her special day -- from wearing the perfect gown to hosting the most extravagant reception. But what happens when the dream of the perfect wedding turns into a nightmare? Janae knows about this pain firsthand. Her husband, Michael, got so drunk before the ceremony that he passed out cold after saying “I do” and didn’t wake up until the next day! Janae attended the reception by herself and spent her wedding night with her bridesmaids at a hotel. Their wedding from hell took place two years ago, but she still tears up at the memory of that fateful day. Can she ever forgive Michael's mishaps, or is he doomed to the doghouse forever? Then, Angela is a self-professed bridezilla who makes no excuses for her demanding ways. She even created a newsletter for her bridesmaids with the rules and regulations they must follow to participate in her wedding! Her sister and maid of honor, Vanessa, worries that Angela's nitpicking will cause her fiancé, Marvin, to run for the hills. What's behind Angela's controlling behavior, and is she headed for heartache on her special day?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Big Time Moochers!
programme.desc: Parents express frustration with their twin sons' disrespectful behavior.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Old Flames
programme.desc: What happens when you can't let go of a meaningful relationship from the past? What are the boundaries when getting in touch with an old flame while you're married? Although toying with old flames can get you burned, it can also be the spark that rekindles lost love.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Hula Hooper's Bad Boyfriend
programme.desc: Marcy and Scott say they believe their daughter, Danielle, has Stockholm syndrome from her boyfriend, Justin. They claim Justin is an abusive narcissist who has manipulated their daughter into believing he’s “God’s gift to the world.” Danielle says she loves Justin, and he’s not going anywhere. She says the only reason Justin has ever laid hands on her is to restrain her from her own angry rages, and her parents don’t understand their relationship. Justin says he’s a great guy with an “X factor” and doesn’t understand why Danielle’s parents dislike him. Although he’s currently dealing with a serious legal problem, he says he’s not a criminal, narcissist, or an abuser. And, in a shocking twist, Danielle reveals to Dr.Phil and her parents a secret about her relationship with Justin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Pursuing the Predator
programme.desc: Pedophiles once lurked in parks and around schoolyards, and then they prowled the playground of the World Wide Web. Now these predators have a more sinister method at their fingertips sending explicit text messages directly to your child's cell phone. Dr. Phil examines the latest technological threats to your kids and shows you how to protect them.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Why Is My Mom Faking Cancer?
programme.desc: Jessica says her mother, Patricia, claims she is defying the odds by becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. But Jessica insists her mother isn’t sick at all and that she is lying about her health to gain sympathy and attention. She says Patricia has been spinning stories about various medical ailments for as long as she can remember -- and it’s time to come clean. Patricia strongly denies her daughter’s accusations and insists her diagnosis and incredible survival story are real. Why does she claim Jessica is out to get her? Emotions run high when mother and daughter meet on Dr. Phil’s stage. Do Patricia’s claims hold up? And, can this mother and daughter repair their fractured relationship?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Barely Escaping a Fetal Abduction
programme.desc: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Teen Love Trauma
programme.desc: What happens when an unhealthy teen relationship threatens to tear a mother and daughter apart? Giesel says her 18-year-old daughter, Devynn, is obsessed with her boyfriend and is damaging a once promising future. Watch the drama unfold as a pregnancy scare rocks this teen's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Troubled Teen Love
programme.desc: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Liar,Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers
programme.desc: In part two, will accused liar Sarah, who fibbed about having cancer, miscarriage and muscular dystrophy, change her ways?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - "My First Face-To-Face Meeting"
programme.desc: In part one, viewers met 21-year-old Bailey who says she has the greatest love story of the century. She says she met Jasmine on social media eight months ago and that it was love at first post. She says they’ve been communicating day and night but have never spoken on the phone and have never met. When Dr. Phil first tried to talk to Bailey, she became insistent that her mother, Ericka, not participate in the show, and Bailey angrily walked off the stage. Bailey decided to come back to tell Dr. Phil she wants to meet Jasmine for the first time because she has something important to tell her. Will Dr. Phil allow Bailey to meet the target of her obsession?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
programme.desc: Beka is a mom of three teenage girls who she says are angry, violent and out of control. She says an argument with her oldest daughter Arielle escalated to a life-threatening altercation when the 16-year-old stabbed her with a kitchen knife. Arielle was arrested and sent to juvenile detention for the incident, but is she remorseful? And are her 15-year-old identical twin sisters following in her footsteps? Beka says they are "evil" and have threatened to kill her too. But the twins tell a different story, claiming Beka is the one who is manipulative and abusive. They say she drinks excessively, has choked them and has even tried to take her own life. Can Dr. Phil get to the root of the real problem in this tumultuous household? Beka's husband, Jody, weighs in. Plus, Dr. Phil delivers a shocking message to this family in crisis -- Don't miss it.

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Uncle Kevin Responds (Part 2)
programme.desc: Bridget says she’s not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace.Dr. Phil says Bridget is a parent in denial and in need of a wake-up call. He sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Baby Scam? Amie's Explosive Reply
programme.desc: Did a woman accused of fake pregnancies really lie?

programme.title: Dr. Phil - Regret Marrying Older Spouse
programme.desc: Brenda says she fell in love with and married her husband, Don – despite their 26-year age gap. But soon after, she claims her “Prince Charming” turned “crazy” and “temperamental.” Is their age difference at the root of their issues? Then, Bev says she’s concerned for her sister, Melanie, who married her much younger man, Devar, after meeting him on a Jamaican vacation. Is Devar in it for love, or for a green card and money? And, Dr. Phil catches up with best-selling author Mitch Albom.

The drama peaks in Freestyle as Camden Murphy (Classroom Crusher) attempts a comeback, but Armando Castro (El Toro Loco) fights to secure his first-ever Stadium Series Championship.

Elite drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit in a high-stakes gauntlet of head-to-head JCB Racing, technical Skills Challenges, and jaw-dropping Freestyle runs. From the legendary Grave Digger to the prehistoric power of Megalodon, every moment is packed with the raw energy and engine-roaring excitement that only Monster Jam can provide.

programme.title: Championship Series - Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing
programme.desc: The Georgia Dome is rocking with 60,000 fans ready for Monster Jam racing excitement!

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Pis
programme.desc: David se queda encerrado en el lavabo. Carbonell intenta abrir la puerta pero es imposible; el inquilino anterior montó allí un refugio nuclear.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Huerto
programme.desc: David toma conciencia de la degradación del medio ambiente y decide hacerse ecologista.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Un Día Normal
programme.desc: Las familias de López y David han hecho planes para celebrar las fiestas navideñas prescindiendo de ellos. Por ese motivo, los dos deciden pasar de las navidades y fingir que se trata de días normales.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Abuela
programme.desc: La abuela de David se presenta por sorpresa y asegura que ha notado que está a punto de morirse y quiere que eso ocurra en casa de su nieto.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Patató
programme.desc: La abuela Sunción aún vive en otra época. No entiende lo que significa vivir juntos sin estar casados o que dos amigos compartan piso para pagar el alquiler.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Talento
programme.desc: Quim Monzó pide a López que le escriba su próxima novela. Nadie debe enterarse. David quiere estrenarse como director de cine y empieza a preparar una película.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Bolero
programme.desc: López se va de viaje a Cuba y regresa con una cubana. Está decidido a casarse con ella para que obtenga la nacionalidad española pero David se enamora perdidamente de ella. Los dos acabarán peleándose para acompañarla al altar.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Alternativa
programme.desc: Una compañía de teatro alternativo contrata a David como actor. Empiezan a tener problemas cuando les niegan la subvención que habían pedido y no saben de donde sacar el dinero para acabar de montar el espectáculo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Rabia
programme.desc: David y López son un par de pesimistas y deciden espabilar a Emma porque creen que vive en un mundo feliz e irreal.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Mucha Cara
programme.desc: David consigue un papel en una serie de televisión. Su personaje ha sufrido un accidente y está en el hospital, muy enfermo y con el rostro desfigurado.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Escayola
programme.desc: La vida es sueño y los sueños, sueños son. El capítulo empieza con un sueño de López en el que aparece en situaciones muy inusuales hasta que se da cuenta de que se trata de un sueño.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Clase
programme.desc: López regresa a la universidad para conseguir el título de licenciado. Allí comprueba que los estudiantes de ahora no tienen nada que ver con los de su época.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Una Revelación
programme.desc: Mientras ve una película, David tiene una revelación mística y creer que es Jesucristo. Vestido de Jesucristo, acaba convenciendo a todos sus amigos. Su primer milagro es la multiplicación del donut.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Dobles
programme.desc: López y David están hartos de vivir juntos y deciden separarse. López se marcha del piso y encuentra otro, más pequeño y más caro.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Ritmo
programme.desc: Ha llegado el verano y todos tienen ganas de ir a la playa a ligar y a ponerse morenos. López y Ramón montan un stand de la radio en la playa pero deciden aparcar el trabajo e irse a ligar en tanga.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Ded de Venganza
programme.desc: Ángel, el guardia urbano de la playa, busca a Emma para devolverle el zapato que perdió en verano y para decirle que la quiere.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Hierbecitas
programme.desc: La abuela de David no puede dormir, está hiperactiva. El médico que va a visitarla le receta unas "hierbas" de maría. Todos deciden aprovechar la ocasión.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Toda La Vida Por Delante
programme.desc: Oriol, el padre de López, se jubila y se instala en casa de los chicos. La alegría de la jubilación le dura poco, en casa se aburre y esto le envejece prematuramente.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Cera
programme.desc: Stasky amplia las posibilidades del bar ofreciendo un servicio a domicilio. Emma se ofrece a llevar un pedido al Museo de cera pero, las horas pasan, y no regresa. David y Stasky van a buscarla.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tinc Un Àngel de La Guarda
programme.desc: Para librarse de una multa, Emma dice que es la novia de Ángel, el guardia. Pero Ángel se entera de su mentira y decide que va a pagárselas todas juntas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Lo Tengo Todo Controlado
programme.desc: Emma no sabe como decirle a Ángel que no quiere casarse con él. David y López tampoco creen que el matrimonio funcione. Quieren convencer a Emma de que no se case pero ella les dice que no se preocupen, que todo está controlado.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Pío-Pío
programme.desc: Emma y López llevan a Marujito a un concurso de canto de canarios porque están convencidos de que puede convertirse en una gran estrella.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Un Tesoro
programme.desc: Pol regresa a Barcelona por unos días y David está muy emocionado. Pero, al reencontrarse, se dan cuenta de que su relación de amistad ya no es como antes.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Una Cyberamiga
programme.desc: López conoce a Guillermina en un chat y se enamora. Pero, por culpa de una casualidad, Guillermina confunde a López con David y David decide no sacarla de su error.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Hormonas
programme.desc: Ahora que López y Guillermina son novios, nunca encuentran ni el momento ni el lugar para tener un poco de intimidad.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo 48 Horas
programme.desc: López tiene planeado un fantástico fin de semana con Guillermina pero todos apuestan que no serán capaces de aguantar tantas horas juntos.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo un Cacao
programme.desc: López se quiere casar con Guillermina y se va a Finlandia a pedir los papeles del divorcio a Diana. Allí se despierta algo en su interior a ritmo de salsa.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Remordimientos
programme.desc: Mientras López está en Finlandia, David y Guillermina se lían. A su regreso, David está muy extraño. Los remordimientos no le dejan vivir.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Piso
programme.desc: Josep López es locutor de radio en una emisora local. A sus treinta y cuatro años se da cuenta de que debe independizarse y empieza a buscarse un piso.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Miedo
programme.desc: David y López se enteran de que a Emma le dan miedo las películas de terror y deciden aprovecharse. Esa noche, Emma va a quedarse a dormir en su piso y ellos traman un plan para hacer un trío con ella creyendo que ella aceptará a la primera.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Envidia
programme.desc: Un nuevo becario llega a la radio en la que trabaja López. Es un chico que no acaba de funcionar; López intenta ayudarle pero lo único que consigue es que el chico se aproveche de él.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Una Edad
programme.desc: López quiere celebrar su cumpleaños con una gran fiesta pero David cree que ya es demasiado viejo para esas cosas.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Dudas
programme.desc: Pol, que está absolutamente convencido de ser homosexual, se enrolla con Emma y supone que no por eso dejará de serlo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Un Padre Hippy
programme.desc: Oriol, el padre hippy de López, se presenta en casa de su hijo y decide instalarse unos días. David queda realmente impresionado con Oriol, sería genial tener un padre así.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Sofocos
programme.desc: Ariadna, la hija de Mercedes, se enamora de López, que también queda prendado de ella. David le acusa de infanticida.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Destino
programme.desc: David recibe una carta del Ministerio de Defensa conforme debe ir a la mili. David pide a López que le espere y cuando regrese seguirán siendo compañeros de piso.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Nervios
programme.desc: López queda para cenar con Ramón y con su mujer, Rosa. Durante la cena, Rosa no le dirige la palabra pero, a espaldas de Ramón, le tira los tejos.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Una Fan
programme.desc: Pol descubre que Emma está enamorada de López y les prepara una cita a través de un anónimo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Problemas Con La Mamá
programme.desc: David descubre que su madre tiene un amante y decide contárselo a su padre pero no sabe por donde empezar.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Problemas Con Los Papas
programme.desc: López alquila una plaza de parking. Él no tiene ni coche ni carnet de conducir pero ese parece un buen sistema para planteárselo en serio e intentar sacárselo.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tenemos Un Amor Común
programme.desc: David y López se han enamorado de Emma. Ninguno dejará que el otro la vea a solas y saque ventaja. Carbonell intenta vender a todo el mundo un viaje organizado por ella.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Pareja
programme.desc: Carbonell, Ramón, Pol y Mercedes regresan del viaje. Ramón no para de contar que Pol le salvó la vida y que siempre estará en deuda con él.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tengo Añoranzas
programme.desc: Emma se ha ido. López y David están hechos polvo tras su marcha. Al enterarse de que el administrador del bloque busca un nuevo inquilino para la casita de madera, David y López salen desesperadamente en busca de Emma.

programme.title: Platos Sucios - Tenemos Un Lío
programme.desc: David y López no saben qué hacer con un paquete de droga que les ha llegado por error. Si lo venden, pueden sacar mucho dinero pero si les pillan... aunque quizás deberían preocuparse por si su dueño lo reclama.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates - Episode 1

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Orphan Bikes

programme.desc: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an “Orphan Bike” show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Wounded Warrior Project
programme.desc: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Biker Lore
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Biker Lore
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Don't Tell Dale
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

Dale has the buyer, but will he outbid his own client for the exclusive find?

programme.title: Truck U - Revived Raptor

programme.title: Truck U - Day in the Dirt

programme.title: Truck U - Chevy Day
programme.desc: Line ‘em up. It’s a Chevy day on Truck U as Bruno and Matt look at a couple of bowtie trucks in the shop. They do everything from styling upgrades to common problem fixes, and as always, they give you some life lessons along the way.

programme.title: Truck U - Beat the Drum

programme.title: Truck U - Outdoors Jeep

programme.title: Truck U - We don’t void warranties
programme.desc: Bruno and Matt try to find a way to void the factory warranty on a long haul Tundra.

programme.title: Truck U - Camping in Comfort
programme.desc: Matt helps a buddy get his Ram 2500 Longhorn ready for it’s next camping and hunting trip. As a trade out he gets a little party time in the trailer.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - DISCOVERIES IN JERSEY
programme.desc: Ray explores buying a unique, hand built car the Schultz family has kept in their New Jersey home for years. The car was originally called the Schultz El Fierro but it’s officially titled in New Jersey as a “Schultz Special” from 1958. It was used to drag race and held numerous racing records, but most important to the family was that it was driven by the legendary Carroll Shelby. With a frame and style much similar to the Shelby Roadster, the Schultz family wonders if it inspired one of the most well known automobiles in America. In another epic New Jersey story, Ray finds Mario Andretti’s 1965 IndyCar. The catch: it’s completely in pieces hidden away in a garage. The iconic driver talks about his days on the track with that car and Ray attempts to negotiate a deal to buy the parts.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - MOVIE CARS
programme.desc: How do you cast a car in a movie? What are the secrets to the build? Hollywood car designers give Ray the ultimate tour of some memorable movie cars, including a look at the recently found “Hells Chariot”, the last surviving car from Grease. We also hear the backstory to “Bumble Bee” from Transformers, take a look at the making of the tanks for Hunger Games and stumble upon the iconic 1958 Chevy Impala from American Graffiti.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - HOT ROD HOLY GRAIL
programme.desc: While visiting the estate of automotive genius and land speed record holder Willie Glass, Ray uncovers a set of extremely rare Ardun cylinder heads, which is a hot rodders dream discovery. He also visits the infamous H & H Flatheads outside of Los Angeles and discovers a surprise connection to the Earnhardt family.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - CORVETTE SINK HOLE
programme.desc: A massive sinkhole opened underneath the National Corvette Museum in Kentucky. Eight amazing cars were swallowed up, including the 1,000,000th Corvette. AmeriCarna was given exclusive access to document the removal of the cars from the sinkhole and the painstaking restoration of the 1,000,000th Corvette.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - ROAR AT THE SHORE
programme.desc: On the beaches of Wildwood, NJ, an iconic vintage race, The Race of Gentleman, takes place annually: period cars, period dress, pure authenticity. Ray puts a car in the race with a very special driver, who turns out not to be a Gentleman.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 93 Rotterdam
programme.desc: The welterweight superfight between former GLORY world champion Endy Semeleer (36-2, 18 KO) and current GLORY lightweight world champion Tyjani Beztati (26-4, 9 KO) will take center stage in the main event of the evening. After dominating the lightweight division, Beztati moves up to welterweight for the very first time in his GLORY career. GLORY featherweight world champion Petch (169-40-3, 27 KO) and RISE national champion Kento Haraguchi (25-3-1, 14 KO) made their trilogy fight official for the co-main event. Two former middleweight title challengers collide as the number one ranked Michael Boapeah (17-4-1, 7 KO) takes on the number three ranked Ulric Bokeme (32-5, 17 KO), both fighters chasing a rematch at champion Donovan Wisse. Top Dutch star Tayfun Özcan (86-10-3, 28 KO) will make his highly anticipated GLORY debut against French champion Majid Amarouche (25-2-1, 10 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 91 Paris
programme.desc: The GLORY welterweight title will be on the line in the main event as the reigning & defending champion Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) welcomes the challenge of top contender Chico Kwasi (42-5, 22 KO). In the co-main event, after his crazy GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix performance, the wild & exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (66-2, 58 KO) steps down to light heavyweight and meets the hard-hitting Paris-based Kevin Oumar (33-4, 7 KO), a French kickboxing champion & budding MMA star. Belgian-Moroccan superstar Youssef Boughanem (187-43-8, 119 KO) steps into the GLORY ring for the very first time in his illustrious career as he meets the Ukraine’s Stanislav Kazantsev (25-8-1, 7 KO). The best of French kickboxing will be on display throughout the rest of the card as a host of the nation’s top stars will be in action against opponents from all over the world.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 92 Rotterdam
programme.desc: Donovan Wisse (20-1, 10 KO) puts his middleweight championship on the line against number one contender Ulric Bokeme (32-4, 17 KO) in the main event of the evening. Wisse is one of the top P4P kickboxers on the planet today and is chasing his fourth straight title defense. After his Grand Prix heroics, the number one ranked heavyweight Levi Rigters (17-2, 8 KO) returns to action to take on dangerous late notice replacement Nico Pereira Horta (22-8, 3 KO) in the co-main event. The ‘King of The Hague’ crown is up for grabs when rivals Michael Boapeah (16-4-1, 7 KO) and Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-9, 36 KO) clash. The two top middleweights meet in this local derby match-up where the winner walks away with bragging rights in a fight that is sure to split the arena.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: The eight-man one-night GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix will crown the baddest light heavyweight striker on the planet. The eight participants are: GLORY champion, #C Tarik Khbabez (58-10-1, 28 KO), Morocco. Former champion, #1 Donegi Abena (27-10, 7 KO), Suriname. Former champion, #2 Sergej Maslobojev (38-6, 23 KO), Lithuania. Undefeated in GLORY, #3 Stefan Latescu (17-2, 8 KO), Romania. ‘Mister Cool’ #4 Ibrahim El Bouni (41-9-1, 22 KO), Morocco. The wild & unpredictable, #5 Bahram Rajabzadeh (67-2, 59 KO), Azerbaijan. Top French light heavyweight, #6 Pascal Toure (20-6, 7 KO), France. Veteran fighter, #7 Bogdan Stoica (58-14, 40 KO), Romania.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix 2024
programme.desc: The eight-man one-night GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix will crown the baddest light heavyweight striker on the planet. The eight participants are: GLORY champion, #C Tarik Khbabez (58-10-1, 28 KO), Morocco. Former champion, #1 Donegi Abena (27-10, 7 KO), Suriname. Former champion, #2 Sergej Maslobojev (38-6, 23 KO), Lithuania. Undefeated in GLORY, #3 Stefan Latescu (17-2, 8 KO), Romania. ‘Mister Cool’ #4 Ibrahim El Bouni (41-9-1, 22 KO), Morocco. The wild & unpredictable, #5 Bahram Rajabzadeh (67-2, 59 KO), Azerbaijan. Top French light heavyweight, #6 Pascal Toure (20-6, 7 KO), France. Veteran fighter, #7 Bogdan Stoica (58-14, 40 KO), Romania.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: A Wonderful Lie
programme.desc: Fading romance author Rebecca Sinclair concocts a desperate plan to reignite her dwindling career and fractured marriage. She creates a web of lies and her twisted plot leaves her trapped in a nightmare of her own making. Rebecca must scramble to keep control or risk being consumed by the very deception of her own doing.

programme.title: For How Much
programme.desc: Nelson and Justice are childhood friends who seem to compete with each other over everything, but are inseparable. 10 years later, Nelson has some financial problems that he hasn’t shared with his wife yet. Justice returns and wants to catch up with his old friend. Justice is wealthy and successful and offers Nelson an opportunity to dig himself out of his financial hole, but with some unusual terms. Nelson risks it all to beat Justice one last time, but For How Much?

programme.title: Bloodline Secrets
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old Keisha is engaged to be married to the man of her dreams, Joseph. Joseph believes he’s ready for marriage with the love of his life but his best friend, John, has his doubts about Keisha’s faithfulness. When family secrets come out of the shadows, it puts their marriage and lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Love and Deceit 2
programme.desc: Carolyn, a successful businesswoman moves to a new town in hopes of laying down some roots after her divorce. She joins a local women’s group ran by Beverly Jordan a respected therapist to help process her emotions. When in reality, she’s there to rekindle an old flame with a former lover, who happens to be Beverly’s husband.

programme.title: Murder on the Blade
programme.desc: Tobin, a young man with a troubled childhood is currently working through his trauma with a professional counselor. Meanwhile, there is a serial killer on the loose targeting sex workers, and several clues are pointing to both him and his troubled relationship with his mother.

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: As Draven faces financial ruin and a serious illness, her marriage to Adam frays. She reconnects with Ceceilius, a wealthy ex, finding comfort in his stability. But as their romance blossoms, Adam’s jealousy spirals into a dangerous obsession, fueled by terrifying dreams and a mysterious woman, Robin. With a wedding on the horizon and secrets unraveling, love and betrayal collide, leading to a shocking conclusion where nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Mama Jones
programme.desc: Mama Jones is very territorial when it comes to her family since the murder of her eldest son a few years back. More problems occur when her youngest son moves back home with his girlfriend and their little surprise.

programme.title: Stick Up
programme.desc: The story about two friends from high school who try to turn two women from nothing into something by making them sell drugs and prostitute. Things go wrong after they find out what they are getting themselves into. But it’s up to Tierney to try to save her friend from destruction!

programme.title: Rackades
programme.desc: Ricky and his two friends are introduced to a life of scamming and finesse. Everything seems to be going great until they cross the wrong one, and their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: One-2
programme.desc: Two detectives, Hart and Johnson work alongside local hustler Tae & G. They have similar personalities, but work on opposite sides of the law. While working to take down HeavyHand, a local kingpin, Hart finds himself at the mercy of another known gangster, and find himself working with Tae & G to bring them down.

programme.title: Through Sickness and Hell
programme.desc: When a police officer is trapped in a toxic marriage, he must find the strength to break free from his abusive wife, risking his career, reputation, but also his life as he battles the damaging stigma surrounding domestic violence against men.

programme.title: Loyalty and Larceny
programme.desc: Broke couple Deon and Tiff accidentally steal a package of premium weed meant for a local dealer working under Queen Pin. Forced to become rookie dealers in Dallas to pay off their debt, they fumble their way through the drug game while trying to survive the ruthless Queen Pin and a vengeful rival, C-Mo. When they uncover a deeper betrayal, they must fight for their lives and a shot at running their own LA empire.

programme.title: A Matter of Heart
programme.desc: Balen, a successful family man, risks everything for a reckless affair. His wife, Krista, faces a harsh reality as her sacrifices are tested. Enter Latricia, a ruthless temptress with no shame. A story that weaves a tale of emotional turmoil, family crisis, unwavering faith, and the destructive power of temptation. Will love or lust prevail?

programme.title: Commandments of a Female Hustler
programme.desc: Three childhood friends, Lala, Binky, and Jay grew up together on the streets of East Baltimore. Wanting a better life for themselves, they learn the ways of hustling. When they align themselves with one of the most powerful drug dealers in the game, their loyalties are tested, and the very commandments that once bound them start to break.

programme.title: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas - Houston Part 1
programme.desc: Chef Ben and the gang arrive in Texas’ BIGGEST city, Houston. With new challenges in store, will they level the leaderboard?

programme.title: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas - Houston Part 2
programme.desc: The Sorted guys go head to head in a street food fusion battle in Texas’ BIGGEST city, Houston. Who will come out on top?!

programme.title: It All Begins With A Song - Episode 1
programme.desc: A film about one of the most important and unknown forces in music: The Nashville Songwriter. With over 50 masters: Ben Folds, Garth Brooks, Brad Paisley, Luke Bryan, Rodney Crowell, Kacey Musgraves, John Hiatt, Keb Mo, Liz Rose, Claude Kelly and more!

programme.title: USA Through Film 2 - Episode 1
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city’s heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There’s this ‘all senses on overload’ side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: America's Musical Journey - Episode 1
programme.desc: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.

programme.title: American Beats - American Beats: Traditional African Music
programme.desc: The Twin Cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, while distinct in character, share a deep appreciation for music and cultural diversity. Chunz and Makh set out to discover the sounds and messages of unity emerging in the African community with traditional performer Christian Adeti and dive into a new genre of Somali rap with rapper DJ Fawzi. With it’s vibrant modern culture and rich musical history, The Twin Cities are a special destination you won’t want to miss.

programme.title: American Beats - American Beats: Polka Music
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: American Beats - American Beats: Jazz Music
programme.desc: Kansas City, Missouri, is an integral part of jazz history in America. Shaped by legends who once graced its streets, it is bursting with deep history, mouth-watering cuisine and a lively jazz scene. World-renowned trumpeter, tap dancer, and entertainer, Lonnie McFadden and celebrated singer and tap dancer Chloe McFadden, show Chunz and Makh what it’s all about. From finger-licking barbecue to sports events and a bustling nightlife, this city is a cultural hub offering endless opportunities for a fun-filled getaway.

programme.title: Cheat Meal - Cheat Meal: Virginia Beach, Part 1
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica head to Virginia Beach where they’re tasked by celebrity chef Cliff Crooks to create the ultimate cheat meal for a local restaurateur. Armed with the power of their taste buds, the dynamic duo checks out the best places to eat, including Oishii Burger, Chick’s Oyster Bar and Klassic Doughnuts, to build an off-the-charts meal of epic portions.

programme.title: Cheat Meal - Cheat Meal: Virginia Beach, Part 2
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica dive back into Virginia Beach's vibrant food scene to build the ultimate cheat meal for George Culver, the food-loving force behind the popular @iheartfoodvb. From the tropical vibes at Moxy Virginia Beach to the game-filled hangouts at Beachside Social, and the delightful flavors of Oh Mochi, De Rican Chef, and Belvedere South, they pull out all the stops to craft a meal that’s as unforgettable as it is indulgent!

programme.title: Cheat Meal - Cheat Meal: Galveston
programme.desc: Tyler and Monica head to Galveston, Texas, to create a fiery feast for Concetta, the spice-obsessed owner of Maceo Spice & Import Co. From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Mario’s Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.

programme.title: The Main Event - The Main Event: Alabama
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America’s oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America’s most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
