programme.title: The Goode Family - Freeganomics
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. The Goodes get the support of world-renowned freegan, Heinrich Mueller for their street festival to show the community ways to conserve.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Freeganomics
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. The Goodes get the support of world-renowned freegan, Heinrich Mueller for their street festival to show the community ways to conserve.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Trouble In Store
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen is accused of shoplifting and banned from One Earth, her favorite store.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Trouble In Store
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen is accused of shoplifting and banned from One Earth, her favorite store.

programme.title: The Goode Family - After School Special
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen and Gerald tutor at-risk kids; Ubuntu unknowingly joins an eco-terrorist group; Bliss starts her own business.

programme.title: The Goode Family - After School Special
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen and Gerald tutor at-risk kids; Ubuntu unknowingly joins an eco-terrorist group; Bliss starts her own business.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Goodes Gone Wild
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen thinks she's finally won her father Charlie's approval when he adopts a bizarre animal named Gutterball from her pet rescue. Che helps Gerald with the college's squirrel problem.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Goodes Gone Wild
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen thinks she's finally won her father Charlie's approval when he adopts a bizarre animal named Gutterball from her pet rescue. Che helps Gerald with the college's squirrel problem.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Goodes Gone Wild
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Helen thinks she's finally won her father Charlie's approval when he adopts a bizarre animal named Gutterball from her pet rescue. Che helps Gerald with the college's squirrel problem.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Fastest Car on Earth: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed is crippled with a fear of driving after one round in the GRX. Can he pull himself back together in time for his next race?

programme.title: Speed Racer - Mach Five vs. Mach Five: Part 1
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed is framed for robbery by Mr Cumulus, who has had a duplicate Mach 5 built for his own ends.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Mach Five vs. Mach Five: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Cumulus attempts to take over the world, setting the stage for a showdown between the two Mach 5 automobiles.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Royal Racer: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Spritle and Prince Jam team up to save the Racer family and the kingdom of Saccharin.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Car Hater
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Mr Trotter, a man who hates cars ever since his son perished in an auto accident, sets out to rid the world of cars.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Race Against Time: Part 1
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed and Trixie scour the Sahara for an archaeologist's daughter, and come across a fantastic kingdom.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Race Against Time: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed and Trixie are made slaves and ordered to dig up treasure. But Speed has an escape and rescue plan in mind.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Gang of Assassins: Part 1
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. While sightseeing in Japan, the Mach 5 team crosses paths with a gang of assassins who are out to sabotage an international peace conference.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Gang of Assassins: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed learns to his disgust that Racer X has joined the assassins. But is it for real?

programme.title: The Goode Family - A Goode Man is Hard to Find
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald thinks Mo and Trish want him to be the sperm donor for their next child; Charlie decides to teach Ubuntu how to be a man.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Pilot
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Fearing that she is not close enough to Bliss, Helen smothers her teenage daughter with frank discussion about safe sex.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Pilot
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Fearing that she is not close enough to Bliss, Helen smothers her teenage daughter with frank discussion about safe sex.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Pilot
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Fearing that she is not close enough to Bliss, Helen smothers her teenage daughter with frank discussion about safe sex.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Gerald's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald pays for the family to adopt a highway, but picking up trash requires them to work with a gang of white supremacist prison inmates.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Gerald's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald pays for the family to adopt a highway, but picking up trash requires them to work with a gang of white supremacist prison inmates.

programme.title: Bizaar
programme.desc: The premiere destination for mind-blowing animation.

programme.desc: The premiere destination for mind-blowing animation.

programme.title: Bizaar

programme.title: Speed Racer - Motorcycle Apaches
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. A astronomical base in the Southwest is being terrorized by a band of apaches on motorcycles, and calls Speed for help.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Motorcycle Apaches
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. A astronomical base in the Southwest is being terrorized by a band of apaches on motorcycles, and calls Speed for help.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Car in the Sky
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. When the Racers crash on a deserted island with no food or water, they turn the Mach 5 into a makeshift aircraft in order to go for help.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Trick Race
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Exactly a year after the Alpine Race, the Car Acrobat Team challenges Speed Racer to a race to determine the superior driver. But all is not what it seems...

programme.title: Speed Racer - Race Around the World: Part 1
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed takes part in the most important race of his career, the Around the World Grand Prix.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Crash in the Jungle: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed, Trixie, Sprytle and Chim-Chim are captured by a ruthless dictator's jungle army who plans to take over the world.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Terrifying Gambler
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. The Mach 5 team crosses paths with Mr Fastbucks, a wanted criminal with a taste for gambling and who's rigged Speed's latest race with explosives.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Secret Invaders: Part 1
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. The Mach 5 team come across yet another band of assassins seeking to take over the kingdoms of Ambrocia and Abalonia.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Secret Invaders: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed Racer fakes his death to draw out Elegantor and his assassins.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Car Destroyer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Dr J.D. Crepit, a mad scientist who hates cars because his son was crippled in an auto accident, plots to destroy all the cars in the world.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Desperate Racer
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Trixie wants Speed to lose a race, so that her friend's brother will win and use the prize money to heal her. Meanwhile, a royal jewel is hidden inside a pineapple - one of many given to the competing racers.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Dangerous Witness
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed is asked by the Chinese Princess Pedal to be her bodyguard, as a gang of assassins have taken a job on her.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Race the Laser Tank
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. A gang of crooks have captured top-secret plans for a new weapon: a tank with a laser device. When Speed tries to interfere, they decide to test the tank on him.

programme.title: The Goode Family - A Good Game of Chicken
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald's outraged when he discovers Cranky, a local BBQ restaurant owner, is selling "meatless chili with chicken" and soon takes a stand, protesting and trying to convince Cranky to remove the chicken.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Man on the Lam
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed is taken hostage by Lawson Lamster, an escaped convict searching for the money he stole before being captured. Unfortunately, Lamster's partners are right on his tail.

programme.title: Speed Racer - Junk Car Grand Prix
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. The Junkyard Grand Prix is hosted by a rich baron in honour of his missing daughter. But in fact she appears in the race as an unknowing competitor to Speed.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Great Plan: Part 1
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed Racer enters his first race to win money for his family. Meanwhile, a gang of robbers are after Pops's secret plans... which he hid in the windshield of Speed's car.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Great Plan: Part 2
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed Racer must win a dangerous mountain race against Ace Ducey to save his father's plans to improve the Mach 5.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Graffiti in Greenville
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Bliss' high school requires 30 hours of community service for graduation, so while her friends escape to Costa Rica for "charity work," Bliss, who can't afford the trip, gets stuck cleaning graffiti at a local park.

programme.title: The Goode Family - Public Disturbance
programme.desc: Meet Gerald and Helen Goode, a couple who live by the motto WWAGD ("What Would Al Gore Do?"). They're zealous vegans, they drive a hybrid, and they recycle everything possible. Even the family dog, Che, is vegan. Gerald wants a Public Broadcast Radio affiliate in Greenville so bad that he and Helen host a pledge drive and Gerald surprisingly raises all $100,000 needed, from an old woman named Ruth.

programme.title: Speed Racer - The Great Car Wrestling Match
programme.desc: Teenager Speed Racer aspires to be the world's best race-car champion with the help of his friends, family and his father's high-tech race-car, the Mach 5. Speed discovers that a former racing driver Gadge Zoomer has taken to car wrestling (demolition derbies) to support his family, and attempts to get him to leave this destructive sport.

programme.title: El Corrido del Bato Loco
programme.desc: El bato loco como lo dice en el corrido, un hombre valiente y de muchas agallas, llamado Emilio Beltrán, por un conflicto de opresión campesina sale herido de muerte su padre Don Jacinto Beltrán y se ven en la necesidad de matar a un hombre por defenderse, mandado por el cacique y opresor de los campesinos, un gringo llamado Mr. Williams que como mujer tiene a través de un abuso y como pago de una deuda de un campesino muy humilde a una mujer llamada Roció profundamente enamorada del bato loco y a pesar del dolor de una madre tiene que dejar su tierra para emigrar a los estados unidos en el estado de Texas, en donde se encuentra a un camarada que de primera instancia le intenta robar su mochila.

programme.desc: Un hacendado abusivo que se ha dedicado a comprar por la fuerza los ranchos vecinos al suyo, ya que sabe que hay oro en estos. programme.title: Sonora y sus Ojazos Negros
programme.desc: La historia se desarrolla en el estado de Sonora, cuando una bailarina profesional es perseguida por un un grupo de matones, en su intento de escapar logra subir a un autobús de pasajeros donde conoce a un Capitán de un barco atunero quien también huye por culparlo de una muerte accidental ahí comienza una historia de amor llena de acción y de emociones.

programme.title: La Sangre Enemiga
programme.desc: Una película que nos revela un insospechado mundo de miseria moral, poblado por seres marginados sociales que aman, odian y viven como irracionales. unos personajes miserables afligidos por la frigidez, la impotencia, la lascivia, el retraso mental, la enanez, la ceguera o la joroba se dedicaran a vulnerarse, corromperse, herirse y matarse entre si.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Every time I Get Out
programme.desc: The party, now in possession of the CRYSTAL ROD, has fled from the thieves in the Sunken City through the underground tunnels. Once outside, they discover the Queen's forces are invading from the sea, bombarding the city. They quickly slip out beyond the walls, north of the city... but to go where?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Every time I Get Out
programme.desc: The party, now in possession of the CRYSTAL ROD, has fled from the thieves in the Sunken City through the underground tunnels. Once outside, they discover the Queen's forces are invading from the sea, bombarding the city. They quickly slip out beyond the walls, north of the city... but to go where?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Back Into The Fire
programme.desc: The party has been caught trying to escape and with them, the Artifact. Eventually they wake up shackled to a cart, and surrounded by guards on their way back into the occupied Sunken City… at the mercy of the Queen's Forces.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Carl Linger
programme.desc: "The party has adjusted to their new lives the best ways they know, how but they are eager to escape. - - Follow the party as they continue working their 9 to 5 jobs with only one lunch break and four 15 minute coffee breaks fun by the evil Queen’s forces."

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Best Plans
programme.desc: "The Party is in action, and so is the party. Our would be heroes are posing as entertainment to get aboard the rooks ship and steal back the rod before they can escape. - - Will they succeed?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - On The Run
programme.desc: "Our Party, aka Blackwater Bandits, have earned their name stealing back the rod from the Rook. Now its time for one more performance... the disappearing act. - - Will they succeed in this mid-season finale?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Lost Souls
programme.desc: The Players awake with no memories and must quickly work together to navigate a dangerous dungeon. The extra twist? They have no idea they are playing their actual characters!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Collector's Dungeon
programme.desc: The party has passed the trial! With acceptance into the city of Anwar, their new goal is recovering those stolen memories...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Collector
programme.desc: Tragedy has struck the party, a member has fallen. Adding to their strife, they now find themselves in yet another tough situation below Anwar.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Golbin Warrens
programme.desc: Hurtling down the water passageway on the journey to The Dark, the party's boat takes a beating. Luckily for them, this means their captor The Lovely Lute takes a beating as well. Now they must try to continue their mission for the Crystal Rod.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Short Adventures of Thistle & Arky
programme.desc: Who better to go poking around in goblin tunnels than the only members of the party who will fit inside?! But what Arky and Thistle find in the warrens is not what they expected…

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Irone Stone
programme.desc: The party finds the dwarven city of Iron Stone. Unfortunately, it is under siege by strange magical creatures. And what has become of that dangerous assassin, the Lovely Lute?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Dragon In The Mine
programme.desc: Coming upon the lava-fueled dwarven forge, the party begins to craft anti-magical emerald-imbued weapons. That is, until the whole building begins to shake...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Iron Stone is saved! As thanks, the party receives a bounty of magical crystals and a powerful new iron suit for Arky. Now they head for Rock Bottom, a duegar dwarf city beneath a waterfall in the dark Underground.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Eleven Bright
programme.desc: Reaching Pelion Darrus, the Party finds it under devastating attack from above and below. One hero makes an unexpected journey, dragging the party into a surprising decision in this weeks episode!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Sunken City
programme.desc: The Audio Dungeon crew begin their adventure in the world of Andaria. Finndelar (Tom) the wizard, and Hogar (Dan) the ranger, have just finished their two month journey, and have reached their destination; The Sunken City. Finn's mission is to retrieve a magical device created in part by a local craftsman: Arkie Fint. Hogar, an ally of Finn, was hired to guide and protect him. When they arrive, they find themselves in the midst of a large celebration, as well as a mystery regarding their mission...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - Smithy's Party
programme.desc: Finndelar (Tom) and Hogar (Dan) have arrived in the Sunken City and are now searching for the magical device they have journeyed so far for. After meeting the craftsman Arkie Fint, they travel to Smithy's tavern in hope of finding a clue to their mystery...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Crystal Rod
programme.desc: Smithy's party has proven to be entertaining and everyone is enjoying themselves. Meanwhile, during the festivities, Bludgy, the city's most notorious thief is seen sneaking upstairs, drawing the attention of others. Finn and Hogar's mission hangs in the balance...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars - The Great Escape
programme.desc: Finn and Hogar are tied up below Smithy's tavern along with a few others. Bludgy is about to sell off the crystal rod for a life changing amount ofgold, while Arkie is "retrieving" something important from his workshop.

programme.desc: Marco é acidentalmente atraído por um portal e vai parar no planeta GEMINI8. Lá ele conhece Polo. Em meio a sucessivas tentativas de enviar Marco de volta à Terra, os dois vivem as mais incríveis aventuras e acabam por se tornar amigos inseparáveis.

programme.title: BarryTiger
programme.desc: BarryTiger é uma série animada em 3D vibrante e envolvente, criada para crianças de 1 a 8 anos, que dá vida às aventuras do dia a dia por meio de músicas cativantes e encantadoras. Com uma variedade de personagens coloridos e temas ricos e diversos, a série retrata os momentos alegres da vida da família BarryTiger. A produção musical de alta qualidade — com melodias, arranjos e interpretações de excelência — adiciona ainda mais diversão às cenas animadas e sempre surpreendentes. Prepare-se para cantar, dançar e explorar com Barry e seus amigos em cada episódio emocionante!

programme.desc: Universo Z combina animação com live action, abordando temas universais com valores positivos e incentivando a realização de atividades manuais às crianças da primeira infância.

programme.title: Cante com o Bubu
programme.desc: A série musical da Coruja Pequena está repleta de músicas super divertidas de alta qualidade, escritas com cuidado, talento e originalidade. Cada uma delas vem em um estilo musical diferente para que as crianças possam aprender e se divertir cantando junto.

programme.title: O Som da Música
programme.desc: Em “O Som da Música”, Jacarelvis e seus amigos apresentam as características e sons de diversos instrumentos musicais pertencentes a diferentes culturas. Cada episódio é dedicado a algum instrumento específico, onde são apresentados brevemente a história, os atributos e funcionamento de instrumentos como o violão, o xilofone, a gaita, piano, flauta, entre outros. E a festa sonora fica por conta de Jacarelvis e seus amigos, que apresentam as suas habilidades musicais com cada um dos instrumentos.

programme.title: O Mago das Formas
programme.desc: Viaje para um mundo mágico onde o simpático Mago das Formas revela os segredos dos desenhos! Em cada episódio, três novos desenhos são criados usando formas geométricas básicas e elementos surpresa. Desafios de atenção e curiosidades tornam essa série divertida e educativa, ensinando o conceito de desenho por meio de formas geométricas. Divirta-se e aprenda com o Mago das Formas!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos
programme.desc: Prepare-se para cantar, dançar e aprender! No Volume 01, Jacarelvis e sua turma misturam rock, reggae, blues e até bossa-nova para transformar o dia a dia das crianças em música e diversão. Entre abelhinhas parceiras, escovação de dentes, frutas, bichinhos de estimação e até lições sobre arrumar a bagunça, cada clipe traz humor, energia e muito aprendizado em ritmo animado!

programme.desc: Marco é acidentalmente atraído por um portal e vai parar no planeta GEMINI8. Lá ele conhece Polo. Em meio a sucessivas tentativas de enviar Marco de volta à Terra, os dois vivem as mais incríveis aventuras e acabam por se tornar amigos inseparáveis.

programme.title: Domi Kids
programme.desc: Domi Kids é uma série musical animada em 3D que dá vida às alegres e afetuosas aventuras diárias da família Domi, composta por cinco membros. Com músicas animadas e divertidas, e performances de vários personagens, o programa oferece uma ampla variedade de temas, histórias envolventes e cenários diversificados. A equipe profissional de produção musical garante melodias de alta qualidade, arranjos cativantes e interpretações vocais impecáveis, proporcionando um verdadeiro banquete audiovisual para as crianças. O conteúdo é positivo, divertido e pensado para ajudar as crianças a aprenderem e explorarem o mundo de forma apropriada para sua idade. Também apoia os pais em sua jornada de uma criação mais leve e prazerosa, acompanhando o crescimento e o florescimento dos pequenos.

programme.title: Sopa de Letrinhas
programme.desc: Em 'Sopa de Letrinhas', Jacarelvis e seus Amigos exploram o encantador universo das letras, palavras e fonemas, em episódios rápidos de apenas 1 minuto. Uma série que concilia entretenimento e aprendizado com a temática de alfabetização para crianças de 1 a 5 anos.

programme.title: Recreio do Jacarelvis
programme.desc: Mergulhe em uma série animada pré-escolar cheia de cores, música e aprendizado. A cada episódio, Jacarelvis e seus amigos conduzem os pequenos espectadores por uma jornada divertida e educativa, explorando conceitos como cores, sons de instrumentos musicais e brincadeiras interativas. Prepare-se para se encantar com as aventuras do Jacarelvis e sua turma, enquanto eles ensinam de forma lúdica e cativante.

programme.title: O Som da Música
programme.desc: Em “O Som da Música”, Jacarelvis e seus amigos apresentam as características e sons de diversos instrumentos musicais pertencentes a diferentes culturas. Cada episódio é dedicado a algum instrumento específico, onde são apresentados brevemente a história, os atributos e funcionamento de instrumentos como o violão, o xilofone, a gaita, piano, flauta, entre outros. E a festa sonora fica por conta de Jacarelvis e seus amigos, que apresentam as suas habilidades musicais com cada um dos instrumentos.

programme.title: O Mago das Formas
programme.desc: Viaje para um mundo mágico onde o simpático Mago das Formas revela os segredos dos desenhos! Em cada episódio, três novos desenhos são criados usando formas geométricas básicas e elementos surpresa. Desafios de atenção e curiosidades tornam essa série divertida e educativa, ensinando o conceito de desenho por meio de formas geométricas. Divirta-se e aprenda com o Mago das Formas!

programme.title: Gemini8
programme.desc: Marco é acidentalmente atraído por um portal e vai parar no planeta GEMINI8. Lá ele conhece Polo. Em meio a sucessivas tentativas de enviar Marco de volta à Terra, os dois vivem as mais incríveis aventuras e acabam por se tornar amigos inseparáveis.

Seeing this, Robotnik convinces the villagers that the little fox belongs in jail, and Tails is forced to flee. With Tails all alone, Scratch and Grounder attack, and Sonic makes a last minute rescue.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Robotnik's Rival
programme.desc: Robotnik and a rival named Quark Rex try to cooperate in capturing Sonic. However, Sonic tricks them into becoming enemies, and they try to outdo each other.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - The Magic Hassle
programme.desc: Coconuts acquires a magic wand and magical gadgets from Wes Weasley (after agreeing to forward all payments to Robotnik), and attempts to master them. Meanwhile, Robotnik tries to change Sonic-themed mobium banknotes into Robotnik banknotes in the Mobius Mint.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: When Sonic and Tails are captured by Grounder and Scratch, Sonic tricks them into letting them escape by reminiscing about how they all met. Several badniks seen early on in this episode later resurfaced in Dr. Robotnik's Mean Bean Machine.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Subterranean Sonic
programme.desc: While on pursuit with Scratch and Grounder, Sonic and Tails hide in an underground mine which a miser mole think that they are trespassers.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Lovesick Sonic
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Lovesick Sonic
programme.desc: Sonic saves a female hedgehog from Scratch and Grounder which Sonic falls in love with, while Dr. Robotnik plans to flood a village by stealing the water from the Mobius reservoir.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Slow Going
programme.desc: Sonic must save a family of sloths from Dr. Robotnik's slow-motion ray, but when he himself is slowed down by Scratch and Grounder, Tails and the sloth family must take action.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - High-Stakes Sonic
programme.desc: Desperate to get workers to build a Robotnik statue, Dr. Robotnik opens Casino Night Zone with his pal Smiley but when Sonic stops Scratch and Grounder, Robotnik traps Tails so Sonic has to make a choice to save his pal.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Sonic Breakout
programme.desc: Robotnik imprisons a satirical cartoonist named Sketch Lampoon for making fun of him in his comic book, much to the anger of Sonic, his biggest fan. Sonic purposely allows his own capture as well, but does not expect to be placed in a maximum-security jail cell. With Robotnik angrily sends Sonic in the cell for interfering with his plans once again.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Trail of the Missing Tails
programme.desc: Scratch, Grounder and Coconuts set up a chili-dog trap which then resulted with Tails been captured by a mysterious person so Sonic has to find Tails and for Robotnik and co to capture Sonic.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Close Encounters of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: While Scratch and Grounder try to catch Sonic using a Suction plate, two aliens, one being a prince, crash lands on Mobius. Sonic meets the prince when he finds out that the prince's baby brother would blow up Mobius which Sonic must save.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Momma Robotnik's Birthday
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Big Daddy
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Sonic's Song
programme.desc: A country and western singer released a song about Sonic which is making Dr. Robotnik mad and builds a music destroyer robot.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Birth of A Salesmen
programme.desc: An energetic salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik numerous gadgets to help Scratch and Grounder capture Sonic. However, Robotnik later comes to regret it when Weaseley's gadgets keep backfiring.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Best Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails rescue Lucas, Robotnik's first prisoner, and attempt to reunite him with his girlfriend, Lucinda. However, Robotnik is also in love with Lucinda, and pursues Lucas.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - The Robotnik Express
programme.desc: En route to stop a train of explosives from arriving at Robotnik's munition factory, Sonic and Tails must deal with a duo of bears named Big Griz and Big Mike after Scratch and Grounder tell them that Sonic and Tails are the enemies.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Too Tall Tails
programme.desc: Robotnik takes Professor Von Schlemmer hostage and uses his growth machine to try and enlarge himself. However, the machine backfires, and enlarges Tails instead in nearby Wienerville. Sonic must keep the famished Tails from getting into more danger as Robotnik tricks the citizens into thinking that Sonic is the villain, while Robotnik is the hero planning to save the city.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Tail's New Home
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home to ensure his safety, Robotnik finds out and creates a robot fox family, who pose as Tails' long-lost parents.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Over The Hill Hero
programme.desc: When overweight, elderly superhero Captain Rescue bungles in his attempts to help Sonic, he grows tired of his incompetence. Robotnik then uses Captain Rescue to successfully imprison Sonic in an impenetrable force field, and Tails and Captain Rescue must save him.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Blank-Headed Eagle
programme.desc: Scratch suffers a blow to the head and believes that he is his favorite television character, Edgar Eagle. Sonic uses this to his advantage in preventing another of Robotnik's schemes.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Mystery of the Missing Hi-Tops
programme.desc: There is a Sonic Appreciation Day happening where Sonic is the guest in a hotel. However, someone steals his power sneakers and now Sonic and Tails have to find the culprit.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - So Long Sucker
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him and they soon find themselves spinning through interdimensional limbo.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Momma Robotnik Returns
programme.desc: When Robotnik opens up a resort to make the resident Mobians his slaves, Sonic enlists the help of some robots from an area of Mobius called Scrap Valley.

programme.title: Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog - Pseudo Sonic
programme.desc: Robotnik creates a robot Sonic suit with the intent of ruining the hedgehog's reputation. He forces a lab rat named Laurence to pilot by threatening his parents.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Ultimate Collection: Hypno-Disc
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Ultimate Collection: Razer
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. This Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat A
programme.desc: The first ever Robot Wars heat begins. Six brave teams enter the arena for the first time as the four House Robots are unleashed to do what they were made for, turning competitors into twisted and scorched lumps.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat B
programme.desc: Heat B features six contestants, all battling for a spot in the series finals. To make it through, they must prove their mettle in the Gauntlet, Trial (British Bulldog) and battle it out in the Arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat B
programme.desc: Heat B features six contestants, all battling for a spot in the series finals. To make it through, they must prove their mettle in the Gauntlet, Trial (British Bulldog) and battle it out in the Arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat C
programme.desc: Six more contestants enter the arena. This week the arena transforms into a Robot football pitch and Sergeant Bash meets his match. Which contestant will score a place in the finals?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat C
programme.desc: Six more contestants enter the arena. This week the arena transforms into a Robot football pitch and Sergeant Bash meets his match. Which contestant will score a place in the finals?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat D
programme.desc: Lightweight special; the six contestants this week make up for what they lack in size, with agility. Can they weave their way through the house robots in the gauntlet? Or will they knock each other off-course in this week’s trial, stock car racing?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat D
programme.desc: Lightweight special; the six contestants this week make up for what they lack in size, with agility. Can they weave their way through the house robots in the gauntlet? Or will they knock each other off-course in this week’s trial, stock car racing?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat E
programme.desc: Six contestants enter the arena, but how many will leave? As the robots navigate their way through this week’s trial, the Labyrinth, who knows what lies around each corner? Victory or elimination?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Heat E
programme.desc: Six contestants enter the arena, but how many will leave? As the robots navigate their way through this week’s trial, the Labyrinth, who knows what lies around each corner? Victory or elimination?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Grand Final
programme.desc: No cues necessary as six new contestants play robot snooker in this week’s trial. The victors of this heat will be joining the other winners in the Grand Final. Who will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The First Wars?

programme.title: Robot Wars - Series 1 - Grand Final
programme.desc: No cues necessary as six new contestants play robot snooker in this week’s trial. The victors of this heat will be joining the other winners in the Grand Final. Who will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The First Wars?

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
programme.desc: An insightful view into how Robot Wars Series 1 was created.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Second Wars - Best Of
programme.desc: Take a look back at the phenomenal second series, relive the highs and lows of the house robots and competitors of The Second Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Ultimate Collection: House Robots
programme.desc: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars - Ultimate Collection: Chaos 2
programme.desc: Follow Team Chaos's journey. From humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat A
programme.desc: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat B
programme.desc: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat C
programme.desc: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat D
programme.desc: As the knockouts continue to streamline the competition, this week’s special has separate competitors trying to knock-down objects and hit targets to score the most points in Pinball Warriors.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat E
programme.desc: Competitors need to hold their own in this week’s trial, King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in centre of the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals?

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat F
programme.desc: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. It’s his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this week’s trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat G
programme.desc: Even more barrels are stacked up, only to be knocked down by a competitor in another Pinball Warrior. After a one-sided fight, a unanimous decision from the judges decides the victor of this week’s heat finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat H
programme.desc: This week’s special event has legs. The Walker Battle special featured robots that do not use wheels or tracks as locomotion battling it out, do they stand a chance against the house robots?

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat I
programme.desc: Half-way through the heats and Pinball Warrior returns to Robot Wars as another robot comes to test their aim and score against the house robots. The arena claims another robot as the knockout competitions march on.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat J
programme.desc: The last robot football of The Third Wars in this week’s special. A spot in the final isn’t the only thing the heat final can offer one of the competitors this week.

programme.title: Robot Wars - The Third Wars - Heat K
programme.desc: The sixth Pinball warrior run introduces another competitor to test their skills against the targets, and the house robots. In the knockouts, the house robots are being exploited as the competitors over-crowd the CPZ zones.

programme.title: Sennentuntschi
programme.desc: 1975, Swiss Alps: In a remote mountain village, a beautiful and mysterious woman shows up. Only the village policeman takes care of the strange woman and tries to find out who she is. There are hints that she came from the H??henalp Alp, where herdsmen do unthinkable things to get the company of women. Many dark truths are revealed that should better have remained hidden. A tragedy of lust, insanity and murder is brought to a seemlingly pure and perfect world. It is the beginning of a nightmare of religious insanity, hypocrisy, abuse and belief in demons, who destroys a young family and brings a whole village to destruction.

programme.title: Dracula in Love
programme.desc: Leila, a lonely young soul spends the night partying with her friends Nancy, David and Nash in a warehouse. As the boys drink up and smoke pot all social barriers between the sexes crumble. Leila, hit on by both men, hides away from them. Alone she senses there is someone else who wants her and certainly he is not of this world. A 200 year old Dracula escapes from a crate and reveals himself to Leila and tells her that she is his lost love. For him to live again and be with her, she must bring him the blood of her friends to drink and make love to him. Hypnotized by his sexual powers, Leila does as she is told. Leila and a handsome young Dracula get away and live happily ever after.

programme.desc: Host Lisa Nguyen cooks up some crispy sizzling crepes and grilled lemongrass pork.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30 - Lebanese Take-Out
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts creates a Lebanese supper for four in less than thirty minutes.

programme.title: Magic Makers With April Showers - Lamik Beauty
programme.desc: Kim Roxie discusses building LAMIK Beauty, a clean beauty brand rooted in faith, purpose, and resilience.

programme.title: Magic Makers With April Showers - Afro Unicorn
programme.desc: April Showers shares how Afro Unicorn was created to uplift children through positive imagery.

programme.title: Yankee Hustle - The proposal
programme.desc: On the night of his girlfriend's graduation party, Dare finally musters the courage to propose to her, but the mixed reactions from her affluent family leave him questioning their future together.

programme.title: Yankee Hustle - The proposal
programme.desc: On the night of his girlfriend's graduation party, Dare finally musters the courage to propose to her, but the mixed reactions from her affluent family leave him questioning their future together.

programme.title: Design for You - Explore Colour
programme.desc: We explore colour in all its complementary, contrasting and muted forms. Karen Richards of K Interiors will be helping us explore the use of colour.

programme.title: Sugar and Spice - Indian Vegetarian
programme.desc: Spices can transform any dish into a sensational culinary experience. Yudhika shows you how to add a bit of magic to your favourite veggies dishes with an Indian Vegetarian inspired Menu. She first prepares an Almond Crusted Paneer accompanied by a spicy Mint Chutney then a delicious Cauliflower & Pea curry, Creamy Potatoes with Spinach and these are served with Homemade Puri Bread.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: When their grandma falls ill, Diamond and her closest cousins risk everything to save her and keep their family together.

programme.title: Finest Homes - Apartment Living
programme.desc: We take a closer look at a beautiful apartment home in Johannesburg, South Africa.

programme.title: Finest Homes - Art plays the lead role
programme.desc: We visit a home designed by kimh.nieu, where art plays the lead role. We chat to an art curator about the journey of collecting art and look at the principles of an eclectic mood board.

programme.title: Flood
programme.desc: Remi’s shot at a clean life is ruined when his brother is taken hostage, forcing him back into the world he left behind.

programme.title: This is it - Team #KE
programme.desc: As Tee turns a year older, he reunites with his sister, while Dede struggles to fit in.

programme.title: Magic Makers With April Showers - conditionHER
programme.desc: Co-founder Wendy Rose Berry shares how conditionHER was created to center women’s wellness and care.

programme.title: Yankee Hustle - Running Out Of Status
programme.desc: Dare, a diligent employee, is abruptly informed his visa will expire and won't be renewed. Facing the harsh reality of losing legal status, he must navigate bureaucratic hurdles and personal challenges within weeks, deciding whether to return to his home.

programme.title: Celeb Rides - Real Life Racer
programme.desc: We visit South African racer for a fast ride and what his dream garage looks like.

programme.title: Celeb Rides - Riding Round
programme.desc: It’s fashion week and we want to find out which cars describe celeb model’s fashion style.

programme.title: Belinda Baidoo Model Search Africa - ACCRA Audition
programme.desc: The judges check out the contestants, and though they have some no-go's, some girls manage to wow them!

programme.title: Belinda Baidoo Model Search Africa - Christie Brown
programme.desc: Ghana's buzzing fashion scene has come so far - this week the models focus on design and casting.

programme.title: The Perfect Mate
programme.desc: When Hope's relationship crumbles, she seeks a Christian man to meet her family's expectations. Jesse steps up, but it's challenging.

programme.title: Clunkers
programme.desc: Ritchie's setback leads to an unexpected journey in the world of used car salesmanship.

programme.title: Act Like You Love Me
programme.desc: Successful dentist Kelly has everything but love as her sister’s engagement pushes her to finally face romance.

programme.title: Dirty Dilemma
programme.desc: Malika and Kyrie strive to maintain a relationship built on love and loyalty in a world full of lies and temptations.

programme.title: This is it - Changes
programme.desc: Dede gets a response on her application to her dream company.

programme.title: Hargrove
programme.desc: Filmed in jazz clubs across the globe on trumpet-legend Roy Hargrove's final tour before his untimely death, this film illuminates his immortal impact on Black music while delving into themes of power, race, and ethics in the music industry.

programme.title: Barbados The Windy Island
programme.desc: Discover the untamed allure of Barbados, the elusive gem amongst the Caribbean islands, hidden from Christopher Columbus but unveiled by the intrepid Pedro a Campos in 1500.

programme.title: He Watches Over Me
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a vicious assault, a woman faces a life-altering choice, when she finds she holds the fate of her attacker in her hands.

programme.title: The Gardener - Saxonwold garden
programme.desc: We visit the Saxonwold garden of Michael Hogan; create the perfect hanging shelf for pots and ornaments and look at a plant that is low maintenance a true bang for your buck.

programme.title: The Gardener - Front garden
programme.desc: We take a closer look at Clivias, do a walk-through of Tanya's much adored front garden, make a kokedama and explore the do's and don'ts of lawn care.

programme.title: MOG Talk - Essence of a Christian 2
programme.desc: Digging deeper into the essence of faith.

programme.title: The Lost Wave: An African Surf Story
programme.desc: The Lost Wave follows surf writer Sam George and pro surfers to Sao Tome's remote shores.

programme.desc: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.

The renegade bounty hunter and Banshee track an Alliance airship to its secret Roswell base. Logan is ready to turn himself in to get some answers, but the Banshee grab Sh’lainn and Logan must turn to the Alliance for help with her rescue.

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies: Aliens, Myths and Legends - Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: On their first Alliance assignment, Nick and Sh’lainn are sent by Rinaker to the Himalayas to find a missing team of mountain climbers. They find the alien refugees – the Yeti – who are guarding a stolen Lycanthrope weapon powerful enough to destroy the planet. All are in danger, as the werewolves will stop at nothing to get the weapon back in their possession.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - | Blue Whales and Reptilian Ruses | Episode 2
programme.desc: God's Gang embarks on an underwater mission to rescue blue whales, only to encounter an alien ambush. The team faces unexpected challenges while trying to infiltrate a clandestine blue whale party. Suspense builds as they attempt a daring rescue operation.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker helps Harvey

programme.title: Troy the Train - Frank the Fire Trucks saves Gary

programme.title: Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance helps Ethan

programme.title: Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck collects the bouncy balls

programme.title: Troy the Train - Dane's Wrecking Ball causes mayhem
programme.desc: Dane's wrecking ball accidentally fell off and knocked Frank! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Christopher getsstuck in cement
programme.desc: Christopher fell asleep and woke up covered in concrete! Troy selects the best truck to help release him: Dane the Crane!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - BUILDING BLOCKS, FALLING TOWERS – ROOKIE AND THE MOLE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Show do Jacarelvis
programme.desc: O Jacarelvis tenta fazer um show quando uma abelhinha aparece em seu caminho, esse imprevisto pode se tornar uma grande parceria!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Papa Tudo
programme.desc: Ao som de um gostoso rock vamos todos comer direitinho, o Jacarelvis e amigos mostram como é bom e gostoso comer de tudo um pouco e como e importante os legumes e frutas nas refeições.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Escovo os dentes
programme.desc: Um divertido reggae feito para ajudar as crianças durante a escovação dos dentes, tornando esse momento divertido e prazeroso.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Minha Escola
programme.desc: Uma homenagem bem didática ao segundo lar de muitas crianças!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Da Aqui
programme.desc: Aprenda sobre as frutas e alguns de seus benefícios ao ritmo de um Rock'n Roll!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Castigo
programme.desc: Vamos tentar entender esse tal de castigo ao som de um divertido blues !

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Mico Tuco
programme.desc: O Mico Tuco te cutuca nesse rockabilly que não vai deixar ninguém parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Tem que limpar
programme.desc: Tudo que suja, molha ou quebra precisa de alguém pra ajeitar, não é mesmo? O Jacarelvis e seus amigos mostram como ajudar a mamãe e o papai de uma forma divertida e segura.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacare Careca
programme.desc: Uma divertida cantiga que brinca com a sonoridade do nome dos animais.

programme.title: LMN's - Submarino
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Chip y sus amigos caen a un lago donde son recogidos por la nave espacial de un átomo de sodio, que los lleva a Sodia, una ciudad submarina. Allí, los átomos de sodio y cloro viven un largo conflicto. El cloro quiere unirse al sodio para formar moléculas de cloruro de sodio, mientras que los átomos de sodio prefieren permanecer juntos. La patrulla de antimateria entra en contacto con el cloro y les propone proporcionarles rifles para dominar al sodio y así obligarlos a molecularizarse, pero Chip se burla de la antimateria y logra que el cloro y el sodio dejen de ser enemigos, restableciendo la paz en el mundo submarino.

programme.title: LMN's - La tormenta
programme.desc: Dentro de un viejo molino de viento, en medio de una fuerte tormenta, Chip y sus amigos esperan que pase y continúan su camino. Afuera, bajo el viento tempestuoso, la patrulla de antimateria le comunica al Dr. No que ya han encontrado al niño. El malvado científico confía en que esta vez no fallarán. Pero cuando el viento amaina, Chip idea una estrategia y deja a la antimateria encerrada en el molino, mientras él y los átomos siguen adelante.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 192 - Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).
