programme.title: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf
programme.desc: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf
programme.desc: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf
programme.desc: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word
programme.desc: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant
programme.desc: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed
programme.desc: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf
programme.desc: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold
programme.desc: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Root Of Evil
programme.desc: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
programme.desc: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Clockwork Smurfette
programme.desc: Clockwork Smurf is feeling so lonely that, out of compassion, Handy Smurf builds a female companion for him. The trouble is, Clockwork Smurfette does not know she's supposed to have eyes only for her mechanical counterpart, or that she should avoid Gargamel....

programme.title: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas
programme.desc: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells
programme.desc: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence
programme.desc: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Snappy's Way
programme.desc: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.

programme.title: Don Smurfo
programme.desc: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot
programme.desc: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs
programme.desc: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking
programme.desc: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy
programme.desc: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum
programme.desc: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow
programme.desc: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I
programme.desc: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet
programme.desc: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island
programme.desc: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing
programme.desc: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time
programme.desc: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon
programme.desc: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs - A Smurf For Denisa
programme.desc: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure
programme.desc: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf
programme.desc: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot
programme.desc: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games
programme.desc: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag
programme.desc: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs
programme.desc: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs
programme.desc: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs - Soothsayer Smurfette
programme.desc: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs - Jungle Jitterbug
programme.desc: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart
programme.desc: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Like It Or Smurf It
programme.desc: The Smurfs are on a paradise Pacific Island. Well, not exactly paradise, since there is a very active volcano, on which a very active Hefty Smurf risks his life as well as Smurfette's!

programme.title: The Colour Smurf
programme.desc: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone
programme.desc: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Romeo And Smurfette
programme.desc: Spring has the Smurfs all competing for Smurfette's affection and Gargamel decides to put a spell on her to help him capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf intervenes and with the help of the foolish Azrael he foils the wizard's plans.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Hefty's Rival
programme.desc: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs - Sassette's Bewitching Friendship
programme.desc: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Little Big Smurf
programme.desc: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: The Smurfs - The Astrosmurf
programme.desc: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy
programme.desc: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Put Upon Puppy
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs - Where The Wild Smurfs Are
programme.desc: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He’d be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha’s dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: Alex y el Huerto
programme.desc: Cada mañana, la abuela le da una semilla mágica a Alex y él se apresura a la huerta para plantarla. Entonces, va a la fuente a por agua, por lo que puede regar las semillas mágicas. Alex espera con impaciencia para ver como la fruta o vegetal va a crecer. Luego, con destellos de magia, surge de una planta del suelo, y ahí está ... ... un naranjo! Va con una cesta y coge la fruta que van a comer para el almuerzo. Abuela y Alex se sientan a la mesa y comen la fruta o beben su jugo. En Al final, podemos ver y escuchar la explicación de las propiedades básicas de la fruta que acaban de comer.

programme.title: A cantar con Fluffy la Conejita
programme.desc: ¡Ayuda a Fluffy a resolver los problemas de sus amigos con rimas divertidas y pegadizas!

programme.title: A cantar con Fluffy la Conejita
programme.desc: ¡Ayuda a Fluffy a resolver los problemas de sus amigos con rimas divertidas y pegadizas!

programme.title: Papelitos
programme.desc: La serie animada “papelitos” cuenta de una manera divertida a los más pequeñitos sobre las simpáticas aventuras de unos animales de papel: Un alce llamado Aristóteles y un pájaro carpintero llamado Tuc-Tuc en el país de papel donde todo por completo está hecho de papel. Divertidas aventuras se acompañan con interesantes clases de manualidades donde los espectadores aprenderán como con papel y cartón crear a todos los personajes de la serie utilizando tijeras y pegamento. El proyecto tiene apoyo de la página web donde están presentados todos los moldes y consejos para crear el mundo de papel. De esta manera el espectador participa en el juego que supone la creación y el desarrollo de muchas habilidades prácticas que distraen a los chicos del encierro permanente de la computadora. El proyecto “Papelitos” es una divertida y didáctica alternativa en lugar de pasar tiempo con la computadora. Toda la acción en el dibujo animado es narrada por una voz en off y repleta de ingeniosos chistes. Cada capítulo dura 5 minutos (la versión sin clase – 4 minutos). La técnica de animación – gráficos 3D que imitan al papel.

programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.

programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.

programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: ¡Echa un vistazo a las recopilaciones de Angry Birds Toons! Cada recopilación contiene varios episodios de tus series favoritas, como Angry Birds, Piggy Tales y Stella.

programme.title: BarryTiger
programme.desc: BarryTiger es una serie animada en 3D vibrante y cautivadora, diseñada para niños de 1 a 8 años, que da vida a aventuras cotidianas a través de música pegajosa y encantadora. Con una variedad de personajes coloridos y temas ricos y diversos, la serie muestra los momentos alegres de la vida de la familia BarryTiger. La producción musical de alta calidad, con melodías excepcionales, arreglos sobresalientes y actuaciones destacadas, añade una capa extra de diversión a las escenas animadas y dinámicas. ¡Prepárate para cantar, bailar y explorar junto a Barry y sus amigos en cada emocionante episodio!

programme.title: Domi Kids
programme.desc: "Domi Kids es una serie musical animada en 3D que da vida a las alegres y cálidas aventuras diarias de la familia Domi, compuesta por cinco integrantes. Con música animada y divertida, y actuaciones de múltiples personajes, el programa ofrece una gran variedad de temas, historias atractivas y escenas diversas. Un equipo profesional de producción musical asegura melodías de primera calidad, arreglos excepcionales y actuaciones vocales destacadas, brindando un festín audiovisual encantador para los niños. El contenido es positivo, entretenido y está diseñado para ayudar a los niños a aprender y explorar el mundo de una manera apropiada para su edad. Además, apoya a los padres en su camino hacia una crianza fácil y placentera, mientras acompaña a los niños en su crecimiento y desarrollo."

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Glumpers
programme.desc: Si la simple convivencia entre dos personas puede hacer que salten chispas, imagínense lo que podría suceder en una casa habitada por seres con 6 personalidades completamente opuestas. Los Glumpers son una pandilla, un grupo de amigos que viven juntos, las acusadas personalidades de los cuales interactúan continuamente. Si entre los seres humanos una simple discusión en general, va a terminar con sólo un par de insultos, en el caso de los Glumpers puede terminar, en el mejor de los casos, en una explosión atómica.

programme.title: Boom and Reds
programme.desc: Boom & Reds, una serie preescolar. Trata sobre Boom, un cálido y amigable ogro violeta, el cual en cada episodio, intentara averiguar que estan dibujando en el suelo, los reds, una pequeña banda de criaturas de cabezas de champiñones. Desgraciadamente, el echo de que Boom no sea muy inteligente no le ayudará, haciendole pensar en locas sugerencias.

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: ¡Sigue a Bernard mientras hace un desastre!

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: Las BFF son un grupo de amigas adolescentes que descubren que juntas pueden superar cualquier situación por complicada que sea y convertirse en… ¡mejores amigas para siempre! Sus aventuras están llenas de momentos musicales y situaciones desternillantes interrumpidas constantemente por Shadow, un personaje mágico y travieso que intenta difundir desesperadamente negatividad y “malas vibraciones”. Sin embargo, ¡sus intentos se verán frustrados por las BFF y sus collares de la amistad!

programme.title: Planeta de Niños
programme.desc: Divertida y cautivadora serie educativa y de entretenimiento para niños, que refuerza virtudes fundamentales y modales enseñados a los niños por sus padres y maestros, en la escuela y en casa. Desde la confianza, humildad y el perdón, a la honestidad, responsabilidad, cooperación y dignidad. El show ayuda a los niños a comprender la importancia desde pequeños detalles como ser corteses, hasta a desarrollar grandes virtudes y habilidades, como saber toma de decisiones.

programme.title: Leoncito Alado
programme.desc: LEONCITO ALADO es un canal de canciones infantiles para niños de 1 a 3 años de edad. Aquí podrás encontrar canciones para tranquilizar, entretener y enseñar valores y talentos a nuestros pequeños espectadores.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Talking Hank esta entusiasmado por su primer dia de trabajo como guardia de seguridad durante la Noche de los Nerditos que se lleva a cabo en la ciudad, pero el trabajo no esta tan repleto de accion como el esperaba.

programme.title: Alex y el Mar
programme.desc: Alex vive en una isla y se prepara cada mañana un desayuno mientras Rocco y Lili juegan juntos. Un científico holográfico aparece en una máquina y le dice a Alex cual es su misión para el día: Alex ha de fotografiar un delfín. Descubrirá todo tipo de vida submarina. Después de un rato, Alex ve un delfín y toma una foto de él. Luego, regresa de vuelta a casa. Al final, una voz explica las características de los delfines.

programme.title: Iron Kid
programme.desc: Gaff, Guardián de la Familia Eon y protector del Puño, está huyendo de la asesina a sueldo Belleza Negra y su equipo de Ninjas Robots. Escapa por poco de su ataque y arroja una caja de madera en una cueva de la Zona Prohibida, un área controlada por el Duque von Rhymer, presidente de la Torre de Hierro. La caja contiene el Puño de Eón.

programme.title: Pim y Pom en el Museo
programme.desc: Pim y Pom, dos gatitos, llevan a los niños a una aventura en el fascinante mundo del arte. Con la fuerza de su imaginación, exploran cuadros de artistas famosos como Vincent van Gogh, Johannes Vermeer, Rembrandt, Seurat y Renoir.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: La Srta. Vanthrax tiene un resfriado y le pide a Talking Ben que sea el maestro sustituto para su clase. Ben esta encantado, especialmente porque los estudiantes van a decidir hoy el proyecto para la feria de ciencias!

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Susie's Hope
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the inspirational relationship between Donna Lawrence (Emmanuelle Vaguer) a pit bull attack survivor, and Susie (Susie Lawrence), an abused pit bull-mix puppy, as they learn to heal and forgive together.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Surrounded by wealth and living with abundant resources in Manhattan, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie, lives a solitary life lacking only frequently absent parents and friends. Estranged from family, having slacker boyfriend troubles, and fired from her waitressing job, sometimes musician 23-year-old Eleanor needs a new place to live and a new job.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain

programme.title: Watercolor Postcards
programme.desc: A small town girl with a troubled past returns home only to find that both her sister and her hometown are in peril. Only when she falls for a man who similarly has dark days behind him will they muster up the faith and love needed to save the things they hold dear in life.

programme.title: Watercolor Postcards
programme.desc: A small town girl with a troubled past returns home only to find that both her sister and her hometown are in peril. Only when she falls for a man who similarly has dark days behind him will they muster up the faith and love needed to save the things they hold dear in life.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: A young man named Walt Disney had big dreams, and no matter how many obstacles he had to face he never gave up--from his tumultuous childhood, to serving his country, to borrowing money, to the creation of his first iconic animated character Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Walt Before Mickey
programme.desc: A young man named Walt Disney had big dreams, and no matter how many obstacles he had to face he never gave up--from his tumultuous childhood, to serving his country, to borrowing money, to the creation of his first iconic animated character Mickey Mouse.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: its the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears and find faith in himself, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids
programme.desc: At their summer camp competition games, Spence and his big brother Zach find themselves on opposing teams: its the dweebs against the bullies. Can Spence make new friends, overcome his fears and find faith in himself, stand up to the bullies and win a trophy in the process?

programme.title: Tentacle 8
programme.desc: A mysterious computer virus wipes out highly classified personnel files at the NSA, prompting a top secret investigation. Raymond Berry, an NSA operative suspected of crimes against the United States, risks his life to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Tentacle 8
programme.desc: A mysterious computer virus wipes out highly classified personnel files at the NSA, prompting a top secret investigation. Raymond Berry, an NSA operative suspected of crimes against the United States, risks his life to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson - Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone
programme.desc: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson - Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships
programme.desc: In this lesson, we'll discover the significance of holy relationships. After all, souls are brought together for the purpose of enlightenment.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie - My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
programme.desc: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie - My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
programme.desc: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie - I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
programme.desc: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?

programme.title: Life Stories with Marc Hoberman - LSWMH - Kurtis Blow
programme.desc: Legendary Hip Hop artist Kurtis Blow talks about his humble beginnings. He speaks about his career in Hip Hop and how he is continuing to help others as he follows his passion.

programme.title: Life Stories with Marc Hoberman - LSWMH - Charis Michelsen
programme.desc: Charis Michelsen talks about her experience in modeling and acting. Charis also shares some exciting news about her newest projects.

programme.title: Life Stories with Marc Hoberman - LSWMH - Perry Donta'e
programme.desc: The Pack Drumline leader, Perry Donta'e talks about his group's audition on America's Got Talent. Perry also talks about his philosophy which drives his passion to help at-risk youth.

programme.title: Life Stories with Marc Hoberman - LSWMH - Armand Mastroianni
programme.desc: Armand Mastroianni talks about his experiences as a young student of film and his journey as a Hollywood director. His body of work speaks volumes to his standing in the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
programme.desc: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
programme.desc: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - Jack Canfield
programme.desc: Jack Canfield, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - SPARSH SHAH
programme.desc: Sparsh Shah, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Day 1 Distro
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Aptivio
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions
programme.desc: Chad Honeycutt, owner and CEO of Evidence-Based Classroom Solutions, pitches his business. Chad discusses how his company addresses the deficit in evidence-based services for students with disabilities, particularly autism and emotional disabilities, in public schools. Despite significant revenue growth, Chad seeks investment due to cash flow challenges, primarily caused by delays in insurance reimbursements. The panel expresses concerns about profitability and the need for clearer communication about the company's mission.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - PSA Security
programme.desc: Phil Fogarty, owner of PSA Security, discusses his business struggles and funding needs with Joe Camberato, CEO of National Business Capital. Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson - Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind
programme.desc: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - Part 1, Day 1 - Welcome
programme.desc: Day 1 welcomes you to Desire Mapping—an approach to living guided by how you want to feel, not just what you want to do. By shifting from goal lists to heart-centered intention, this introduction invites you to honor presence, intuition, and the feelings that shape a fulfilling life.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.desc: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.

programme.title: Sidney Poitier: Icon of Excellence - Episode 1
programme.desc: This is Sidney Poitier at his best: bold roles, powerful stories, and a legacy that transformed American cinema.

programme.title: Stephen King Stories and Decoding David Lynch - Episode 1
programme.desc: From Carrie to Eraserhead and beyond, Stephen King and David Lynch have defined cinematic storytelling for decades.

programme.title: Trailers From Hell - The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
programme.desc: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.

programme.desc: From 'Bonnie and Clyde' to 'Duck Soup,' filmmaker John Landis talks his favorite film trailers.

programme.title: Trailers From Hell - The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

programme.title: Myth & Majesty at the Movies - Episode 1
programme.desc: Celebrating the timeless tales of heroes, gods, and epic battles that defined classic cinema.

programme.title: The Many Faces of Peter Sellers - Episode 1
programme.desc: A master of comic timing and transformation, this is Peter Sellers at his most brilliant and unpredictable.

programme.title: Trailers From Hell - Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1

programme.title: Trailers From Hell - Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 2

programme.title: Trailers From Hell - Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 3

programme.title: Trailers From Hell - Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 4
programme.desc: A “Serial Mom” went to a “Matinee” on “Groundhog Day,” it did not end well!

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying.

programme.title: Joe Dante’s Classic Comedy - Episode 1
programme.desc: When it comes to comedy TFH creator Joe Dante has a soft spot for lovable oddballs, accidental heroes, and big-hearted dreamers.

programme.title: Road to Bali
programme.desc: Two unemployed show-biz pals accept treasure-diving work in Bali for a local princess and they find treasure, love and trouble.

programme.title: Decades of Comedy: 1940s to 1950s - Episode 1
programme.desc: From slapstick classics to timeless musical comedies, celebrate Hollywood's golden age of laughter.

programme.desc: Outrageous, rebellious, and unforgettable, 1970s comedy went full throttle.

programme.desc: High school misfits, teenage rebels, and coming-of-age chaos straight out of Hollywood.

programme.desc: Music documentaries and films that crank the volume with chaos, classic sounds, and more.

programme.title: Gadget Gang in Outer Space
programme.desc: It’s Star Wars meets the Minions! When a spaceship crashes to Earth and reveals a group of quirky little space aliens on the run for their lives, a group of kids learn that all the planets are in danger, including Earth!

programme.title: Camp Spoopy
programme.desc: Pumpkins, goblins and candy...and a puppy in a ghost costume?! Stay right here on Camp Spoopy for all your Halloween craze, all October long!

programme.title: Camp Spoopy

programme.title: I Think My Babysitter is an Alien
programme.desc: When a world-famous astronaut returns home from his latest mission, he brings a unique souvenir to his wife and two children: a piece of an asteroid that hit his space station.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie - Bad Guy’s Birdie
programme.desc: Zo Zo encounters his favorite bird - the falcon - in the park, and his new feathered friend takes Zo Zo for a thrilling ride in the sky! But when it turns out the falcon belongs to Zombie Hunter Joe, he and Zo Zo begin a battle to the death.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie - Weather Warning
programme.desc: Isamu and Zo Zo Zombie make a new friend: the airy Bellow the Cloud. When the young nimbus shows them his ability to change shapes, and to transform water into rain or snow, Isamu gets the bright idea to feed him donuts.

programme.title: Zombie in Training
programme.desc: Isamu and Zo Zo Zombie encounter Hipster Zombie in the cemetery, and decide to have Zo Zo teach him the zombie ropes. Hipster Zombie is a millennial know-it-all, though, and a lousy student, and before long it's time to go back in his coffin.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Pique-Assiette - Ceviche de perche

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Cari et pesto de citrouille
programme.desc: Afin d'utiliser les restes de citrouille d'Halloween, Ricardo propose deux recettes pour en cuisiner la chair et les graines : un cari de citrouille et de poulet et un pesto de graines de citrouille.

programme.title: Amuse-gueule - Omble chevalier en papillote
programme.desc: Au menu : omble chevalier en papillote avec le chef Jean-Marc Soldati, l'alimentation des seniors avec la diététicienne Florence Authier, fêtes et gastronomie à travers le monde, idée dessert avec Amandine Freudiger.

programme.title: La Recette de Guy Martin S08 - Costeleta de vitela, espelta e chantarelles salteadas
programme.desc: O chef estrelado pelo Guia Michelin, Guy Martin, apresenta produtos emblemáticos da França e sugere uma receita para prepará-los.

programme.title: Safran & saveurs by chef Simo - Yassa poulet senegalais et zaalouk parfume marocain
programme.desc: Chef Simo crée une alliance entre Sénégal et Maroc avec un yassa poulet accompagné d'un zaalouk parfumé, le tout rehaussé par une sauce Paris-Dakar. Un régal panafricain !

programme.title: Epicerie Fine S08 - La Provence Verte et Verdon
programme.desc: "Direction la ferme des Jovents, où Camille et Rudy Michel proposent d'étonnantes glaces au lait de chèvre. Près de Tourves, Isé Crébely et Bruno Cayron produisent des légumes anciens et oubliés en maraîchage biologique. Découverte : de jour ou de nuit, les petites habitudes des scorpions et insectes."

programme.title: Donner l'gout - Le Maroc a Carleton-sur-Mer
programme.desc: On rencontre Mohamed, le chef propriétaire du Marin d'eau douce, à Carleton-sur-Mer. Avec sa femme, Iman, et leurs trois filles, il tient un restaurant où on peut retrouver les saveurs de son Maroc natal combiné à des produits québécois.

programme.title: Pique-Assiette - Passatelli aux blettes
programme.desc: Honneur à la cuisine italienne avec la cheffe Francesca Fucci. Elle nous présente sa recette de pâtes à base de parmesan, d'oeufs et de... pain sec. Réduit en chapelure, ce pain remplace la farine.

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Brioche aux canneberges et a la cannelle
programme.desc: Pour souligner la sortie en kiosque du magazine de Noël, Ricardo prépare la recette qui se trouve sur la couverture : une brioche festive aux canneberges et à la cannelle en forme de couronne.

programme.title: Amuse-gueule - Steak de celeri
programme.desc: Au menu : steak de céleri et sauce chimichurri avec le chef Matthieu Maeder, séquence boissons sportives avec Maaike Kruseman, les sirops d'érable avec Johanna Dayer, fêtes et gastronomie à travers le monde, idée dessert avec Amandine Freudiger.

programme.title: La Recette de Guy Martin S08 - Mesclun, roquefort, nectarins, raisin et pickles
programme.desc: Le chef étoilé Guy Martin présente les produits emblématiques du terroir français et propose une recette pour les accommoder.

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde - Pays et marches du monde - Kariba (Zimbabwe)
programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: Epicerie Fine S08 - Vars
programme.desc: "Au coeur des montagnes des Hautes-Alpes, à Vars, Kévin Bonnabel élève des Limousines en axant sa pratique sur l'agroécologie. Éric François cultive du génépi, une plante emblématique des hautes altitudes. Forêts de mélèzes, chamois et bouquetins : gros plan sur le patrimoine vivant local."

programme.title: Les Ambassadeurs 2025 - Pairi Daiza
programme.desc: À l'occasion des 30 ans du parc Pairi Daiza, un voyage sur les cinq continents, à la rencontre de plus de 7 500 animaux, avec Éric Domb, son fondateur, et Catherine Vancsok, directrice scientifique. Avec aussi le curry de Laurence Vieujant et un city trip à Nantes.

programme.title: Les Ambassadeurs 2025 - Pairi Daiza
programme.desc: À l'occasion des 30 ans du parc Pairi Daiza, un voyage sur les cinq continents, à la rencontre de plus de 7 500 animaux, avec Éric Domb, son fondateur, et Catherine Vancsok, directrice scientifique. Avec aussi le curry de Laurence Vieujant et un city trip à Nantes.

programme.title: Safran & saveurs by chef Simo - Taktouka & co
programme.desc: Chef Simo fusionne la taktouka marocaine et la chakchouka algérienne pour un plat unique. Poivrons rôtis, tomates juteuses, oeufs coulants... À déguster sans modération !

programme.title: Safran & saveurs by chef Simo - Taktouka & co
programme.desc: Chef Simo fusionne la taktouka marocaine et la chakchouka algérienne pour un plat unique. Poivrons rôtis, tomates juteuses, oeufs coulants... À déguster sans modération !

programme.title: Safran & saveurs by chef Simo - Taktouka & co
programme.desc: Chef Simo fusionne la taktouka marocaine et la chakchouka algérienne pour un plat unique. Poivrons rôtis, tomates juteuses, oeufs coulants... À déguster sans modération !

programme.title: Safran & saveurs by chef Simo - Taktouka & co
programme.desc: Chef Simo fusionne la taktouka marocaine et la chakchouka algérienne pour un plat unique. Poivrons rôtis, tomates juteuses, oeufs coulants... À déguster sans modération !

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Recettes de muffins
programme.desc: Ricardo suggère des idées de recettes de muffins, des collations nourrissantes qu'on peut transporter partout : muffins aux abricots, muffins au maïs et muffins aux poires, aux dattes et au fromage à la crème.

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Recettes de muffins
programme.desc: Ricardo suggère des idées de recettes de muffins, des collations nourrissantes qu'on peut transporter partout : muffins aux abricots, muffins au maïs et muffins aux poires, aux dattes et au fromage à la crème.

programme.title: Donner l'gout - Le Vietnam a Montreal
programme.desc: À la rencontre de Mitch et Boom, le duo à la tête de La Belle Tonki, un restaurant vietnamien de Montréal. Hélène découvre aussi Anh, la mère de Mitch, qui lui confie les secrets d'une bonne soupe phó.

programme.title: Donner l'gout - Le Vietnam a Montreal
programme.desc: À la rencontre de Mitch et Boom, le duo à la tête de La Belle Tonki, un restaurant vietnamien de Montréal. Hélène découvre aussi Anh, la mère de Mitch, qui lui confie les secrets d'une bonne soupe phó.

programme.title: Les Ambassadeurs 2025 - Jodoigne et ses plus beaux villages
programme.desc: Cette année, le réseau des plus beaux villages de Wallonie souffle ses 30 bougies ! L'émission s'installe à Jodoigne, où Saint-Remy-Geest et Mélin ont tous deux reçu le label. Également : Totemus à Saint-Remy-Geest ; la ferme de Benoît Custine à la Roche-en-Ardenne ; l'univers des Baladins du miroir.

programme.title: Les Ambassadeurs 2025 - Jodoigne et ses plus beaux villages
programme.desc: Cette année, le réseau des plus beaux villages de Wallonie souffle ses 30 bougies ! L'émission s'installe à Jodoigne, où Saint-Remy-Geest et Mélin ont tous deux reçu le label. Également : Totemus à Saint-Remy-Geest ; la ferme de Benoît Custine à la Roche-en-Ardenne ; l'univers des Baladins du miroir.

programme.title: Epicerie Fine S08 - Le Mezenc
programme.desc: "Entre Haute-Loire et Ardèche, les grands espaces du Mézenc se découvrent avec Valérie Courbon, productrice de fruits rouges, et Florian Gibaud, éleveur. Sortie marmottes avec Alexandre Aubry, accompagnateur en montagne ; sensibilisation des randonneurs à la préservation du mont Mézenc avec Sébastien Michel, médiateur et guide nature."

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S07 - King cake
programme.desc: Premières recettes mitonnées par Annick Jeanmairet, accompagnée de Simon Romang : une couronne des rois et des moules poiré gingembre.

programme.title: La Recette de Guy Martin S08 - Veloute de lentilles, beignets de cuisses de grenouilles
programme.desc: Le chef étoilé Guy Martin présente les produits emblématiques du terroir français et propose une recette pour les accommoder.

programme.title: Epicerie Fine S08 - Le Perche d'Eure-et-Loir
programme.desc: "Entre Loire et Normandie, Pascal Gasnier produit du cidre et des légumes ; Antoine Debray se consacre au maraîchage. Rencontre avec Mireille Rosenberger, membre de la Société mycologique loupéenne et du Club mycologique de la forêt de Senonches. Visites de la tourbière des Froux, en compagnie de Benjamin Gouraud."

programme.title: Donner l'gout - L'Inde a Quebec
programme.desc: Hélène s'invite chez le chef Raphaël G. Théberge, au restaurant indien Kundah Hôtel, dans le quartier Saint-Roch à Québec. Après un voyage en Inde, Raphaël décide de se pencher sur les saveurs, les textures et les épices pour les mélanger aux produits typiquement québécois.

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S07 - A nous les bonnes soupes
programme.desc: Annick Jeanmairet et Simon Romang préparent deux soupes bien différentes : une soupe au chou à l'orge perlé et un velouté de panais aux fruits de la passion.

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Moules, pates et salade d'endives et de celeri
programme.desc: Pour les soirs où l'on a envie de bien manger sans passer trop de temps à cuisiner, Ricardo propose des moules aux tomates, des pâtes à la puttanesca et une salade d'endives et de céleri.

programme.title: Les Ambassadeurs 2025 - Le Grand Large a Mons
programme.desc: Découverte du Grand Large à Mons, espace nautique situé en plein coeur du Hainaut. Ce plan d'eau artificiel, créé dans les années 1980, s'étend sur 40 hectares et est aujourd'hui un lieu prisé tant par les amateurs de voile que par les promeneurs et cyclistes.

programme.title: La Recette de Guy Martin S08 - Tarte fine au boudin noir, pomme Golden et mesclun
programme.desc: Le chef étoilé Guy Martin présente les produits emblématiques du terroir français et propose une recette pour les accommoder.

programme.title: La Recette de Guy Martin S08 - Truite pochee, ronde de legumes et caviar
programme.desc: Le chef étoilé Guy Martin présente les produits emblématiques du terroir français et propose une recette pour les accommoder.

programme.title: Epicerie Fine S08 - Le Leman en terre vaudoise
programme.desc: "Rencontres avec Jérémie Clerc, pêcheur dans les eaux du lac, et avec Mélanie Weber, vigneronne passionnée. Visite de l'insolite château de Chillon. Dans le cadre de la lutte contre les espèces invasives qui polluent le Léman : arrachage de la renouée du Japon et sensibilisation autour de la moule quagga."

programme.title: Donner l'gout - L'Italie a Chelsea
programme.desc: Rencontre avec Roberto Catervi, un chef de romain qui s'est installé à Chelsea en Outaouais pour ouvrir une pizzeria avec sa femme. Il livre les secrets d'une vraie pâte à pizza et sa recette de pâtes à la carbonara.

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S07 - Boeuf carotte
programme.desc: Au menu cette semaine : boeuf carotte ! Un plat mijoté qu'on aime bien manger en hiver...

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Potage de carottes, biscuits et marinade
programme.desc: On la trouve toute l'année... Ricardo cuisine la carotte dans un potage, avec une garniture de pleurotes à l'estragon, dans des biscuits dentelle à l'orange et aux carottes et dans une version marinée express.

programme.title: Les Ambassadeurs 2025 - Bernissart
programme.desc: "Balade à Bernissart, au coeur d'une région aux paysages façonnés par l'exploitation du charbon. Ici le travail des mineurs a révélé une découverte insoupçonnée : les bernissartensis, illustres témoins du Crétacé. Le musée des Iguanodons leur est consacré. Détour également par Blaton, et les crètes à cayaux, et par Harchies."

programme.title: Pays et marchés du monde - Pays et marches du monde - Afrique australe
programme.desc: À chaque épisode, un voyage ! Xavier Petit, caméraman reporter, nous fait découvrir un pays, une ville, un peuple et, bien sûr, un marché traditionnel et une spécialité locale.

programme.title: Comment ça pousse ? - Comment ca pousse ? - La Cacahuete
programme.desc: Banane, patate, cacahuète, cannelle, safran... Tout le monde connaît et en a sans doute déjà mangé. Mais savez-vous comment ça pousse ?

programme.title: Epicerie Fine S08 - Le Pays de Montbeliard
programme.desc: "Rencontre avec Nicolas Bucher, éleveur de vache montbéliarde, et avec Nathalie Vernerey, cheffe de culture maraîchère aux Jardins d'idées. Le phytomanagement au Living Lab de Vieux-Charmont, avec Michel Chalot, professeur d'université et biologiste en environnement. « Pas si bêtes », avec Thibaut Seguin, animateur à La Damassine."

programme.title: Donner l'gout - La Syrie a Montreal
programme.desc: Chahla et Tania sont les propriétaires du restaurant syrien Le Alep, à Montréal. Elles initient Hélène à leur culture riche en saveurs et en couleurs et lui présentent les femmes inspirantes qui composent leur famille.

programme.title: PIQUE ASSIETTE S07 - Pasta alla catalogna
programme.desc: Annick et Simon cuisinent la catalogna, un légume vert, d'hiver, avec un petit goût amer. Ail, pommes de terre et piment viennent compléter leur plat.

programme.title: Ricardo S20 - Cinnamon praline cake and hot rum drink
programme.desc: Ricardo prépare un gâteau praliné à la cannelle qu'il sert avec une boisson chaude au rhum et au beurre pour une soirée chaleureuse et réconfortante.

programme.title: Stingray Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Dive into an eclectic mix of the most iconic tracks from the '70s to today, and discover the hits that defined generations.

programme.title: Passe moi les jumelles S11 - Anouk, a home heart
programme.desc: Anouk Hutmacher is an assistant nurse who has been covering the rural territory of Haute-Veveyse for fifteen years. She goes from farm to farm, helping old people to retain their independence. More than just physical care, she offers magnificent human encounters, sometimes funny, sometimes sad.

programme.title: CHIC EN VF S09 - Naval Museum
programme.desc: The Hôtel de la Marine in Paris looks back over two hundred and fifty years of naval history. Multi-talented artist, Aurélie Galois paints industrial canvases made of rubber and small secret boxes.

programme.title: Partis rouler - Electric evolution
programme.desc: Antoine and Alexis ride along a legendary route: the Sea to Sky Highway. In Squamish, they meet Christian Begin who takes them on a high-altitude adventure.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10 - Guy Martin / Amandine Antunez
programme.desc: From Rubens to Degas, exploring the Pau Fine Arts Museum collections. Self-taught and Michelin-starred, at Le Grand Véfour the chef Guy Martin looks back at his gastronomic career. An uninhibited celebration of materials and colour with Rahul Mishra. Amandine Antunez masters the art of stucco marble using plant dyes.

programme.title: #VF - Aur四ia Paoli
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S10 - Mexican craftwork for Dior
programme.desc: A partnership between Dior and Mexican craftworkers produced a vibrant result that exploded onto the catwalk during Maria Grazzia Chiuri's latest runway show. All about the tribal origins of Jerusalem artichokes. An in-depth look at arts and crafts in Normandy, as celebrated by McArthurGlen Giverny. Wearing a leopard skin print.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08 - Art deco
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: La grande galerie de la Francophonie - Riad Sattouf / Eva Jospin / David Hockney
programme.desc: He is one of the great comic-book authors of our time. A brilliant illustrator, author of "L'Arabe du futur" and "Les Cahiers d'Esther", he captures childhood like no one else and has transformed his personal story into a universal work. Also a director, Riad Sattouf is our guest. We also have with us one of the greatest artists of her generation, who has conquered the most prestigious museums. Éva Jospin transforms cardboard, silk or bronze into monumental forests and landscapes, with exceptional technical mastery. And then David Hockney is on show in Belgium, at the Mons Museum of Fine Arts: this is Alex Vizorek's Vizorek'xpert column!

programme.title: CHIC EN VF S09 - Hugo Bourny
programme.desc: From the kitchens of the greatest chefs to that of the Lucas Carton Paris, we discover the Michelin-starred career of Hugo Bourny. Decorative painter, Éloïse d'Argent brings sublime style to ceilings and walls.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10 - Arthur Avellano / Stephanie Trolez
programme.desc: A visit to the Domaine National de Saint-Cloud and its museum. Loose-fitting, flowing and transparent, the designer Arthur Avellano takes latex to new heights. programme.title: La grande galerie de la Francophonie - Antoine de Caunes / Marguerite Li-Garrigue / Kent Monkman
programme.desc: He is a legend of French television, an iconic presenter, director and man of culture. Antoine de Caunes has influenced generations with his unique sense of irreverence. He comes to tell us about his relationship with art and to talk about "Antoine de Caunes, la vie rêvée d'un enfant du rock", the Canal+ documentary series. Also with us is Marguerite Li-Garrigue, one of the most promising artists on the contemporary scene: a unique universe, a rare intensity and a passion for insects, at the heart of delicate and powerful works. Canadian painter Kent Monkman as seen by Alex Vizorek, in the Vizorek'xpert column.

Séverine and Christophe, manufacturing Basque knives.

Meeting the leatherworkers: Valentine Huyghues Despointes and the craftsmen and women of Atelier Tassin. Milliners, cabinetmakers, fan-makers: Anthony Peto, Alain Taral, the Duvelleroy company.

programme.title: Chic en VF - Cherqui foundation
programme.desc: The Cherqui Foundation, a collection of optical and cinematic artworks. Encounter with Jean-Guillaume Mathiaut, an artist whose work never fails to enchant, and his passion for architecture and cabinet-making.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03 - A life of simplicity in the Acadian forest
programme.desc: Julien is welcomed by Anne Galant who hand-built her house on Prince Edward Island. She shares her story and explains how it led to her living a simple life in a haven of peace and tran-quillity.

programme.title: Démo de Mode - Demo de Mode - Julie de Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD - The travellers of the north
programme.desc: At kilometer 371 of Dempster Highway, Nadia and Vincent treat themselves to some creature comforts at the Eagle Plains hotel. They make the acquaintance of Steve, a truck driver and philosopher. Finally, they meet up with Jesse for a bike ride of 34 kilometers.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10 - Philip Chronopoulos / Valerie Tanfin
programme.desc: Avenue Marceau, Paris, the Yves Saint Laurent Museum is dedicated to the great French fashion designer. Chef Philip Chronopoulos officiates beneath the arcades of the Palais Royal. Jean Paul Gaultier invites Simone Rocha to bring a new look to the fashion house's archives. Featherworker Valérie Tanfin makes nature sublime.

programme.desc: Hundreds of thousands of albums sold, a Cat who has been making us laugh and think for over forty years... The Belgian star of the comic strip is also an art enthusiast, and Philippe Geluck is our guest. Originally from Togo, this incredibly gifted artist made the headlines at the "As Known as Africa" fair in Paris, and has established herself as one of the leading figures in contemporary art. Atsoupé is with us. Finally, Alex Vizorek casts his expert eye over the paintings of Philip Guston.

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09 - Rene Pierre games tables
programme.desc: The Lenôtre cookery school, passing on the passion for the culinary arts that drove its founder, the illustrious Gaston Lenôtre. A footwear institution that bears the name of a London district: the Chelsea boot. FONT&ROMANI or the art of high-end rug-making using the Savonnerie technique. The elegance of draping.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10 - Vincent Garnier Pressiat / Yuko Kuramatsu
programme.desc: The Philharmonie de Paris is home to a museum dedicated to music. Vincent Garnier Pressiat's audacious fashion style permeates the French capital. Fashion designer Thom Browne recounts stories inspired by Edgar Allan Poe. The meticulous and delicate art of ceramist Yuko Kuramatsu, adept of the technique of neriage.

programme.title: Démo de Mode - Demo de Mode - Stephane Rolland
programme.desc: As a tribute to Maria Callas, filmed by Claude Lelouch at the Opera, Stéphane Rolland's show recreates the atmosphere of a 1950s gala evening. An autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection which focuses on the graphical aspects, the structure and black and white.

programme.title: Hunting and Nature Museum

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03 - The life of a troubadour
programme.desc: Julien catches up with Anthony, a musician who's been living in a campervan for five years, spending summer in Halifax busking on the streets. It's a lifestyle that means he has to be able to constantly adapt.

programme.title: Démo de Mode - Demo de Mode - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called "Premier bouclier", a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD - Life in the territory
programme.desc: Nadia and Vincent hit the road again in the direction of the north-western territories. They arrive at Inuvik beneath the midnight sun. The adventure continues with a new guide, an Inuit this time. Kylik takes them to the Arctic village by boat.
